Name: Mister Spex
Description:
Mister Spex is a fast-growing international omnichannel company and the most innovative employer in the optical industry. We combine size and power with our unique start-up DNA. We think and act visionary – and as a strong team we enjoy moving things forward and rethinking them. We offer individual career and development opportunities in a positive and supportive working environment with a high degree of flexibility.    

We are looking for talents with a can-do attitude and visionaries, experts as well as career changers who are interested in rethinking the optician and eyewear industry with us, actively participating in shaping it and taking on responsibility. You can find current vacancies via the following link: misterspex.com/jobs.   

Your personality is our strength! 

Founded in 2007, Mister Spex is a multi-award-winning company that has become the leading omnichannel optician in Europe. We have been at the forefront of the industry’s transformational shift, growing from a pure online player into a successful omnichannel optician with more than 6.6 million customers, 10 online shops across Europe and several physical retail stores. A digital native, technology and innovation have always been an integral part of the company’s evolution, from 2D to 3D digital frame fitting tools to intelligent browse functionalities. The focus of Mister Spex is to make eyewear purchase for customers an easy, transparent and fun shopping experience by combining a comprehensive and varied range of high-quality products with optician expertise and services through our customer service, own stores and an extensive network of partner opticians.

Name: Neovision Optometrist
Description:
Neovision is about reimagining traditional retail optometry. Built around our foundational values, we are visibly distinct from the standard industry offering. 
 
Neovision is about providing an exceptional customer service while tending to patient’s eye care needs within an environment that combines professionalism with a fresh contemporary setting
 
With a strong brand, a unique value proposition and an economically resilient business model, we continue to see strong growth driven by customer demand.
 
We are an optometry group in South Africa that offers exceptional eye care services and affordable quality eyewear. With a team of highly skilled and passionate professionals, we are dedicated to delivering unrivalled customer care and exceptional value for money. 
 
As a franchise business, Neovision provides a full turnkey solution that offers deep operational support, an effective marketing strategy, and leverages the benefit of being part of a national brand, enabling the running of your successful practice.
 
Together, we drive service excellence and help you achieve greater success and personal fulfilment. Our franchise partners benefit from our proven business model, training and development programs, and ongoing support from our experienced team.
 
At Neovision, we are committed to reimagining the optometry industry by providing the patient the right product at the right time at the right price and delivering the best possible service to our customers. We pride ourselves on our approach to eye care, our customer-centric philosophy means that we always put our patients first, providing them with the care and attention they deserve.
 
Our passion lies in providing our franchise partners with added value, enabling them to deliver quality eye care that is tailored to the patient's needs. We believe in simplicity, style, and a hassle-free experience for both the optometrist and the patient. This is what we call "The Neovision Way."

Name: Contattologia Oggi
Description:
Contattologia Oggi si propone come portale di informazione e divulgazione scientifica inerente al mondo delle lenti a contatto e della salute della vista. Ovviamente non si potrà fare a meno di parlare anche di Optometria, poiché il contattologo per eccellenza non può che essere l’Optometrista. 
Sito e newsletter presenteranno, in forma semplice e in un linguaggio comprensibile a tutti, articoli sui risultati degli studi scientifici e delle ricerche effettuate in tutto il mondo da università, associazioni scientifiche, laboratori di ricerca e altri organismi scientifici istituzionali, che abbiano come oggetto le lenti a contatto e tutto ciò che è connesso al loro uso, compresi la prevenzione e il mantenimento della salute oculare. 
Saranno oggetto di pubblicazione anche articoli tecnici o riguardanti la professione di contattologo, anche nelle sue vesti di optometrista e/o di ottico, articoli divulgativi, interviste provenienti dai protagonisti del settore, come ad esempio ottici, optometristi, aziende, istituzioni, pazienti, studiosi, clinici e formatori. 
L’obiettivo primario è quello di fare divulgazione sull’evidenza scientifica, a vantaggio dei professionisti e dei loro clienti. Educare il portatore (non semplicemente informare) è l’azione che ci rende padroni dell’applicazione. Ma per educarlo occorre noi essere educati, preparati, aggiornati ai più recenti sviluppi della scienza e della professione.
Contattologia Oggi sarà uno strumento utile a chi vuole educare sé stesso e i propri pazienti, per contribuire a far crescere gli optometristi e gli ottici italiani e nell’interesse primario dei portatori di lenti a contatto e, in generale, del cittadino con problemi di vista

Name: MyopiaMatters
Description:
Myopia, commonly known as near-sightedness, is a rapidly increasing global eye health concern, particularly among children and young adults. The rising prevalence of myopia is closely linked to lifestyle changes such as increased screen time, prolonged near work and reduced outdoor activities.

Awareness and timely management of myopia can protect vision, improve quality of life and help prevent serious eye problems in the future. Together, through education and responsible eye care, we can work toward better visual health.

Yes, MyopiaMatters! Let’s combat together!

Name: GRT Summit
Description:
The GRT Summit is a one-of-a-kind, collaborative meeting of independent-minded ODs & industry committed to Grow, Retain & Transition a thriving business. Since its launch in 2022, GRT Summit has become eyecare's premier destination event featuring collaborative business workshops, advanced medical CE, community & adventure in America's National Parks. 

Attendees leave GRT Summit with the following:
~ Strategies to Grow: business, revenues, profits, team, and oneself, professionally and personally.
~ Strategies to Retain: 5-star patients, key team members, and more profits.
~ Strategies to Transition: practice, patients & people.
~ Strategies to nurture associates into business partners in the practice.
~ Enrollment in a GRT Mastermind group to challenge, inspire & grow.
~ Enrollment in a GRT Analytics program to track performance.
~ Implementation plan for post-meeting success.
~ GRT Mastermind sessions at 1-, 3- & 6-month intervals following the summit for impactful implementation.
~ Entry into intra-office games to challenge and reward transition and growth.

With attendance capped at 40 ODs, GRT Summit provides a unique, intimate opportunity for doctors & industry to connect, collaborate & grow together.

Visit https://www.grtsummit.com/ to register for GRT Summit 2025 Death Valley NP January 31-February 4, 2025 at The Oasis at Death Valley!

Located in Death Valley National Park, The Oasis is the perfect blend of versatility & elegance, creating the ideal environment for 4 days of learning, collaboration, community & adventure at GRT Summit. 

In addition to advanced medical COPE CE & business workshops, attendees, vendor friends & guests will get to experience a plethora of Community activities-- inspirational sunrise hike, star-gazing & s’mores, Social Hour, group meals & more; & 2 days of adventure including choice of: golf (below sea level), all levels of hiking, horseback riding, Jeep 4x4 adventure, The Oasis Spa Experience, e-bike excursion & more!

Name: D&D laboratorio odontotecnico
Description:
Leader nel settore dal 1990, il laboratorio odontotecnico racchiude professionalità ed esperienza. Il nostro obiettivo è la ricerca continua del massimo risultato estetico. Per tanto ci distinguiamo per una lavorazione precisa, di massima qualità e l’estetica perfetta.
Il laboratorio odontotecnico è dotato di moderne tecnologie per la produzione di tutti i tipi di opere fisse e mobili. Tra cui è anche centro fresaggi con una decina di tecnici specializzati per ogni tipo di lavorazione.

FLUSSO DIGITALE
Il flusso digitale è il futuro e l'attuale presente nel settore dell’odontotecnica.
La D&D oltre ad essere un laboratorio analogico, è specializzato anche nel settore digitale, grazie al quale si cerca di convertire tutta la produzione al settore computerizzato. 
Il digitale è vantaggioso perché vi si lavora sia a livello nazionale che internazionale. Tendenzialmente le impronte vengono mandate dal cliente la mattina e la sera il prodotto viene già realizzato; è dunque conveniente anche per la velocità di produzione.

NON SOLO LABORATORIO
La D&D non è solo un laboratorio odontotecnico, ma grazie ai suoi 26 anni di esperienza propone corsi professionali per migliorare il vostro approccio in questo mestiere di estrema precisione.

Acreditamos que a visão vai além do enxergar — ela molda o aprendizado, o comportamento e o desenvolvimento humano. Nossa abordagem é multidisciplinar, ancorada na ciência e movida pela crença no potencial ilimitado das pessoas.

Name: Laboratorul Express de Optica
Description:
Intr-un context in care toate business-urile de optica functioneaza dupa aceeasi reteta, noi am decis sa ne alcatuim propria noastra reteta. O reteta unica, diferita, menita sa demonstreze ca activitatea intr-o clinica de optica medicala se poate desfasura intr-o maniera ultra-profesionista, insa in egala masura apropiata de fiecare oaspete care ne trece pragul. 

Am inceput in urma cu mai bine de zece ani, cu un colectiv de specialisti mic, insa dornic de a face diferenta si de a se autodepasi, si am ajuns ca in prezent sa ne mandrim cu o familie numeroasa, alcatuita din medici oftalmologi, optometristi, experti in montaj si service etc. 

Stim cat de important si de valoros este timpul si de aceea am transformat Laboratorul Express de Optica in singura clinica din Romania care ofera servicii de oftalmologie, investigatii paraclinice, optometrie, comanda, montaj si service de ochelari. Practic, un loc in care sanatatea ochilor si a vederii este analizata in detaliu si in care fiecare persoana primeste raspunsurile si recomandarile de care are nevoie. 

Clinica noastra este dotata cu aparatura medicala de ultima generatie, inalt performanta si tehnologii care sunt considerate in prezent ca fiind varf de lance. Investigatiile paraclinice sunt realizate fara picaturi de atropina, in cel mai sigur, confortabil si rapid mod, sub atenta supraveghere a medicului oftalmolog care ulterior le si interpreteaza. Pe baza acestora, echipa de optometristi poate realiza consultul si efectua recomandarile necesare, 100% personalizate. 

Pentru a facilita accesul la serviciile noastre, am dezvoltat si echipe mobile care pot veni la sediul companiilor si realiza atat analize optometrice, cat si consulturi oftalmologice. Special pentru mediul corporate, Laboratorul Express de Optica a pus la punct programe avantajoase si beneficii de achizitie menite sa vina in sprijinul angajatilor.

Name: Visual Processing Institute
Description:
At the Vision Processing Institute, we're passionate about helping people of all ages achieve their full visual potential.  We utilize the latest advancements in vision science and technology to create personalized Vision Therapy programs.  These programs address a wide range of visual processing challenges in children, adults, and even athletes.

Vision Therapy is a powerful, non-invasive treatment that retrains the brain to process visual information more efficiently.  This can lead to significant improvements in areas like focusing, eye teaming, tracking, and visual-motor integration.  Whether you're a child struggling with reading, an adult experiencing difficulties after a concussion, or an athlete seeking to enhance your performance, Vision Therapy can empower you to see the world in a whole new light.

Ready to learn more? Explore our website to discover how we can help you unlock the full potential of your vision!

Symptoms We Treat: Blurry vision (near/far), double vision (headaches), eye tracking issues (dizziness), vision loss (blind spots), poor hand-eye coordination, depth perception problems (clumsy), trouble processing visuals (reading, objects), focusing difficulties (near/far), memory/attention issues, difficulty distinguishing objects, spatial problems (driving), inattention (safety hazards), fatigue, light sensitivity, reading headaches, vision-triggered dizziness, scanning problems (reading).

Name: ACHIEVE Family Vision
Description:
We are a group of Neuro-Developmental Optometrists that are dedicated to helping each family ACHIEVE their best vision! Not only the ability to see more clearly and comfortably, but also to ACHIEVE their brightest future! 

Our mission: ACHIEVE is teaming up with professionals, educators, and parents to eradicate addressable learning challenges for Utah students by the year 2035!

We can’t do this alone. It will take a village of individuals to make this mission a reality. We need YOUR help!

Here are a few ways that we are beginning to do this:

- Dyslexia & Processing Evaluations to demystify “Dyslexia”, and break it down into its core challenges that are very addressable (Phonetic processing challenges, Eye teaming/tracking difficulties, vision information processing challenges, language processing difficulties, Auditory Processing challenges, mental health concerns, and nutritional effects that can create reading, learning, and attentional challenges). 
- Individualized vision evaluations to help you ACHIEVE the kind of vision you need for your personal goals and needs (We serve both adults and Children).
- Vision Therapy to help overcome vision-related learning challenges, Dyslexia, and other challenges with reading, writing and spelling.
- We treat eye turns and lazy eyes without ever needing to wear an eye patch!
- Neuro-Visual Rehabilitation to help adults and children be able to successfully “Return to Learn” as well as “Return to Play/Work”.
- Myopia Management treatment options to help slow the progression of nearsightedness in children.
- Our highly trained Neuro-Developmental Optometrists can provide vision care to all types of children (special needs, non-verbal patients, those on the autism spectrum, etc)
- We provide free InfantSee vision exams to infants between 6-12 months old.
- creating a network of professionals, educators, and parents to meet the needs that our office cannot do on its own in order to create Thriving Students!

Jongsma Medical is hét adres voor medische contactlenzen, therapeutische brillen en hulpmiddelen op het gebied van Low Vision (slechtziendheid) en Sports Vision (hulpmiddelen voor bij het sporten). Ook kunnen er speciale brillen en contactlenzen voor een adequate beroepsuitoefening worden gemaakt. 

Er is sprake van Low Vision (slechtziendheid) als het gezichtsvermogen niet meer voldoende verbeterd kan worden door een bril, contactlenzen of een medische behandeling. Als dit bij u het geval is, kan onze low-visionspecialist u helpen alles uit uw gezichtsvermogen te halen. Deze specialist kan verschillende onderzoeken verrichten en u vervolgens de hulpmiddelen adviseren en aanmeten, die het beste bij uw hulpvraag passen. Ook verzorgt de low-visionspecialist de aanvraag voor de vergoeding bij uw zorgverzekeraar.

U kunt voor tal van visuele hulpmiddelen bij ons terecht, variërend van brillen, elektronische hulpmiddelen en loepen tot medische contactlenzen, beschermbrillen, filterbrillen en zwembrillen tot therapeutische brillen.

Name: Miller United Optics
Description: Wir folgen unserer tiefen Leidenschaft Menschen zu helfen, ihre Lebensmomente in all den unterschiedlichen Farben und Klängen echt und vollkommen wahrzunehmen. Wir sehen Augenoptik und Hörakustik nicht nur als unseren Beruf, sondern als Berufung – schließlich sind optimales Sehen und Hören wesentlicher Bestandteil für hohe Lebensqualität. Sehen und Hören sind die wichtigsten Sinne, mit welchen wir einen Großteil unserer Umwelt wahrnehmen. Wir sehen es als unsere verantwortungsvolle Aufgabe uns um die Lebensqualität unserer Kund:innen zu kümmern. Basis dafür ist eine vertrauensvolle Zusammenarbeit, um Wünsche und Bedürfnisse beim Sehen und Hören zu erfassen und zu erfüllen. Wir wollen unseren Kund:innen in ihren sich verändernden Bedürfnissen im Sehen und Hören mit unserer Kompetenz und Menschlichkeit begleiten und in den verschiedensten Lebensphasen für sie da sein.

Name: Óptica Colombiana SAS

Name: Oamaru Eyecare
Description:
Hailing from sunny Napier, owners Dave and Debbie Roberts shifted with their three boys in 2006 to set up roots in the ultra spunky town Oamaru. Oamaru appealed to the Roberts family partly because of its unique Victorian heritage, partly because Dave’s great, great grandfather had settled in Oamaru in the 1860’s but mostly because Oamaru is just a really cool place to be.

Visique Oamaru Eyecare are committed to delivering the best professional  eyecare to local Oamaruvians. We stock stunning, fashionable eyewear to suit your style. Finding the perfect pair of frames is a common challenge that customers face.  Our team has been trained in the art of frame fitting, so come in and let us help you choose eyewear that will speak your personality.

100% Locally Kiwi-owned and operated.

Name: Kleinburg Vision Centre
Description:
The doctors at Kleinburg Vision Centre are passionate about early diagnosis and prevention, as well as providing up-to-date education and research to help patients understand the various eye diseases and conditions. Our mantra is To Treat Our Patients The Same Way We Would Want To Be Treated. This mantra holds true for us and can be seen in the detail, attention and patient education the doctors provide during eye examinations.

Visit our optometrists in Kleinburg, Ontario to elevate your eye care to the next level. Patients from Vaughan, Woodbridge, Bolton and Maple, Caledon and Nobleton are welcome!

Name: New Moraka Optics Lab
Description:
Welcome to New Moraka Optics Laboratory, where innovation meets precision in the realm of optical excellence. Established with a commitment to redefine the standards of optical technology, we are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

Name: Óptica Estádio Coimbra
Description:
Na Óptica Estádio Coimbra, vemos mais do que olhos — vemos pessoas, histórias e gerações inteiras que confiam em nós há anos.

Somos uma equipa próxima, que acredita que cuidar da visão é também cuidar do bem-estar. Desde os mais novos aos mais experientes, acompanhamos cada cliente com atenção, escuta e soluções feitas à medida. Aqui, ninguém é tratado como número — cada pessoa importa.

Aliamos conhecimento técnico a uma linguagem simples, para que se sinta seguro em todas as decisões. Trabalhamos lado a lado com oftalmologistas, mas é consigo que construímos relações que duram.

Queremos estar presentes em todos os momentos — na primeira consulta, na escolha dos óculos, nas mudanças de estilo ou nas rotinas da vida. E queremos continuar a evoluir, lado a lado com as novas gerações.

Mais do que vender óculos, ajudamos a ver o mundo com mais clareza, conforto e confiança.

Name: Optometrista Clínico EIRL
Description:
En un mundo donde todos ven de cerca(celulares, laptops, tablets) Velo para que no pierdan la capacidad de ver de lejos.
Especialistas en Multifocales Progresivos. Lentes diseñados para ver a todas las distancias que requieras para desarrollarte con total normalidad en la actividades que desees desarrollar.
Contamos con lentes monofocales (lentes para ver solo de lejos o de cerca) con el tratamiento y en el material que requieras para un desarrollo óptimo en la actividad realizada.
Todos con un seguro y garantía de  7 meses.
Realizamos convenios con diversas empresas, donde los trabajadores y sus familiares pueden acudir a nuestras sedes, adquirir los productos ópticos y estos le podrán ser descontados hasta en tres partes sin interés por la planilla de pagos mensual.

Name: Brillor å Sånt
Description:
Hos Brillor å Sånt möts optisk precision, design och personlighet. Sedan år 2000 har vi skapat en plats där mode, hantverk och synhälsa går hand i hand – alltid med kunden i centrum.

Vi är specialister på både optik och stil, och erbjuder ett noga utvalt sortiment av glasögon och solglasögon i premiumsegmentet – modeller vi själva bär med stolthet. Varje båge är vald med omsorg, och vi kompromissar aldrig med kvalitet eller uttryck.

Vår butik finns i det anrika Valhallapalatset vid Gustav Adolfs torg i Malmö, där jugendstilens historia möter modern design och personlig service. Här får du mer än bara en synundersökning – du får en upplevelse av trivsel, kvalitet, omtanke och lyx.

När du har valt dina drömbågar i butiken tar vårt hantverk vid. I vår egen verkstad slipar och monterar vi glasen med största noggrannhet för att allt ska passa perfekt. Vi gör allt på plats – snabbt, effektivt och med full kontroll över kvaliteten.

Genom åren har vårt engagemang och fokus på kvalitet uppmärksammats flera gånger – bland annat som:

- Årets Skyltfönster 2014
- Årets Ledstjärna 2015
- Årets Butik 2017 
- Årets Servicestjärna 2022

Name: Teixidó Òptiques
Description:
Teixidó Òptiques es una empresa de óptica y audiología profesional, expertos en atención personalizada de alta calidad. Buscamos la perfecta combinación de gafas graduadas y de sol de las marcas más punteras con el cuidado de la salud visual y auditiva, ofreciendo la solución más adecuada para cada persona.

La revisión optométrica de Teixidó Òptiques nos permite detectar cualquier alteración del sistema visual, gracias a nuestros optometristas expertos en diferentes áreas de especialización como exámenes optométricos avanzados, optometría infantil, baja visión y contactología avanzada, ofreciendo un estudio integral de la visión.

Desde nuestros inicios apostamos por la Terapia Visual, lo que nos ha convertido en líderes aplicando las últimas tecnologías para la mejora de habilidades visuales en: dificultades de aprendizaje, estrabismo y ambliopía, insuficiencia de convergencia y lateralidad.

Además, hemos incorporado en los últimos años la detección y tratamiento de alteraciones visuales en daño cerebral adquirido, uso de pantallas y terapia visual deportiva. El aumento de la miopía en los últimos años nos ha llevado a adquirir la mejor tecnología y formación para su prevención y control mediante cristales o lentes de contacto.

En Teixidó Òptiques, nuestro equipo de audioprotesistas cuenta con una gran experiencia en el estudio de la audición, para ofrecer audífonos de última generación específicos a cada pérdida auditiva, así como en la adaptación de tapones a medida que protegen el oído en ambientes con ruido elevado y en medios acuáticos.

Durante 50 años de trayectoria, nuestra filosofía ha sido siempre ofrecer a nuestros clientes un servicio de excelencia, combinando la tecnología más vanguardista con la última tendencia en moda, gracias a un equipo en continua formación.

Somos un centro especializado en estrabismo, ambliopía/ojo vago y problemas de aprendizaje por problemas visuales.
Desarrollamos terapia visual para casos de estrabismo, ojo vago, disfunciones visuales que puedan generar o no problemas de rendimiento escolar, en el trabajo o en el deporte. 
Realizamos también una labor divulgativa sobre todo lo referente a nuestra labor profesional a través de nuestro blog y redes sociales.

Name: Florida Eye Clinic
Description: The Florida Eye Clinic was founded in 1973. At that time, it consisted of one ophthalmologist practicing in a small office in Altamonte Springs. During the past two decades, Florida Eye Clinic has grown to include ophthalmologists and optometrists practicing in 11 locations across Central Florida, from Clermont to Winter Springs, from Kissimmee to Ormond Beach. Our main office, in Altamonte Springs, is a 30,000 square foot building which also houses a state-of-the-art Ambulatory Surgical Center with three operating suites.

Name: Richard Petrie Optometrists
Description:
Redefining eye care for Derby.

At Richard Petrie Optometrists, we’re a forward-thinking independent clinic offering advanced, personalised eye care in the heart of Derby. We combine cutting-edge clinical services with a truly individual approach to patient experience.

We’re proud to be the only clinic in the area offering:

Specialist dry eye assessments & treatment

Myopia control with axial length monitoring

Eyewear styling consultations based on facial features and personal brand

As well as :
Children’s vision & development support
Cerium colour testing for visual stress

Founded by Optometrist Richard Petrie, the practice has served the Derby community for over 50 years. Born and raised in Littleover,  Davina has owned, run and grown the practice since 2014. Davina and her team are passionate about delivering care that goes beyond sight tests—helping people feel seen, confident, and supported in their long-term vision health and with style and comfort.

Our patients include professionals, families, children, and those with complex or chronic eye conditions. Whether you need a check-up, are struggling with uncomfortable eyes, or want expert advice on managing your child’s eyesight, we’re here with the knowledge and technology to help.

We’re more than opticians—we’re your local eye health specialists.

We are an experienced and long established Optical practice. Often pioneering in using technology, we had the first OCT in the region in 2007 and are currently one of few practices with Optomap technology - we LOVE technology.

We are the only Derby practice measuring axial length for Myopia monitoring in children's eye growth and have now become Derby's Premier Private Practice.

Name: Santandreu Salud Visual y Auditiva
Description:
Centro dedicado al cuidado de la salud visual y auditiva de nuestros pacientes. 
Aquí podrás encontrar la última tecnología y formación de nuestros profesionales, para la adecuada prescripción y seguimiento de su solución visual y auditiva. 
Disponemos de un taller de montaje óptico y otoplástico propios que nos permite recortar los tiempos de entrega y cuidar con mimo el acabado final de nuestros productos.

Nuestro examen visual es muy completo, revisando no sólo la graduación, sino el comportamiento de la visión binocular, comprobando la eficiencia visual del paciente, su sistema de enfoque, la alineación de sus ejes visuales, y además realizamos un estudio de lágrima completo y pruebas de salud ocular con el fin de prevenir ciertas patología.

En cuanto al estudio auditivo, se realiza audiometría tonal liminar y supraliminar, RINNE, WEBER, desarrollo de pruebas REM y timpanometría, reflejo estapeidal, alta frecuencia, videotoscopia, etc…, prescribiendo eficazmente una adaptación protésica personalizada. Todo ello con la mejor tecnología de estudio y en un ambiente cuidado al detalle (sala atenuada, instalación para pruebas en campo libre, evaluación de características técnicas de los aparatos...).

Siempre en constante formación para que nuestros profesionales cumplan ampliamente las expectativas y requerimientos de la salud de nuestros pacientes.

Name: Revisatuvista.net
Description:
Blog de salud visual en el que compartimos la opinión de optometristas, sobre el sector óptico tan amplio que disponemos.
Estamos comprometidos con la salud visual de la población, y consideramos que internet es un arma de doble filo para el consumidor de nuestro sector.

La cantidad de información que hay en la red, puede ser un apoyo fiable, que aporte valor al consumidor, como pretendemos conseguir con nuestro blog. O por el contrario, internet puede ofrecer desinformación que destruye la confianza de los clientes en este sector.

En esta organización pretendemos aportar serenidad con artículos de interés para el consumidor final, desde nuestra experiencia y rigor científico.
Si quieres aportar valor, contáctanos y te ofreceremos colaborar con nuestro blog para ganar visibilidad y confianza en tu marca.

Name: Baird Optometrists
Description:
Our Mission

Baird Optometrists take the time to practice optometry the right way, offering an individualised service, complemented by a friendly and enjoyable experience. We love what we do and take great pride in offering our communities the best products and eyecare services.

Our Values

Name: MAC Eyewear
Description:
Why work with MAC & PURE Eyewear? 

At MAC & PURE Eyewear we pride ourselves in offering the independent optician something different.  We provide you with the opportunity to differentiate your eyewear portfolios from the typical mainstream offering of the high street multi-nationals; that which is often replicated by the online optical e-tailer and, latterly, within supermarkets throughout the UK.  Our collections are hand selected, often handmade, eco-friendly or eco-aware and are sold exclusively to independent opticians.  Below is a summary of what MAC Eyewear offers you, the independent optician, to enable you to distinguish your portfolios. 
Benefits 

We offer 9 premium eyewear collections to independent opticians only. These collections have been chosen to fit as many different segements and price points of UK optics as possible. With one more segment coming soon! 

Accounts with the main UK buying groups, Sight Care and PK National. With benefits for their members. 

Our eco-friendly / eco-aware frames, from leading European designers, are typically vibrant and colourful. 

We offer handmade, hand painted frames whilst some incorporate bespoke materials, all to make sure that we offer a truly amazing portfolio. 

Most importantly, we try our best to work with our customers to build and grow a business that works for us both. 

We do not supply to national accounts or supermarkets. 

Amongst others, our portfolio includes Specs by Prue, Outspoken, JF Rey, Exalto, Oxibis and now Jisco, plus our bespoke iGreen and O•SIX collections. Plus now our very own collections of eyewear. 

Our collections include more mainstream styles and also those considered trend forming. 

We operate a selective distribution policy, meaning that we are mindful of our business partners, the brands they stock within our portfolio and their respective locations.

Description:

Kontaktlinsen bieten eine breite Palette an Möglichkeiten um Ihr Sehen zu verbessern. Name: Mission Eye Care
Description:
Mission Eye Care is Calgary's destination for eye care and unique eyewear. Centrally located in the Holy Cross Centre in Mission, just south of downtown. We are a full service optometry clinic with special interest in treatment of dry eye, myopia control, and custom contact lenses for corneal disease. We have 5 highly trained optometrists and offer convenient evening and weekend hours.

Featuring a large gallery with over 1500 frames and sunglasses in a 5500 sq ft state of the art eye clinic. We are committed to utilizing the latest technology and staying up to date on the latest research with expert care from residency trained optometrists.

We are always looking for qualified applicants to join our eye care team. We will train the right candidate and are always eager to interview those already in the business.

Name: PrestígiOÓptica
Description:
Como especialistas da visão, capacitados a diagnosticar, oferecer medidas profiláticas e a prescrever a melhor solução corretiva, a PrestígiOÓptica possui a tecnologia moderna e avançada que permite-nos oferecer serviços de saúde visual completo ao nível das necessidades de todos pacientes.
Realizamos consultas de Optometria, Oftalmologia, Contactologia, exames de diagnóstico como: Mensuração da pressão intra-ocular (PIO), Mapeamento da retina, Campimetria, Fundoscopia, Tonometria. Oferecemos soluções a nível de lentes oftálmicas nas mais variadas especificações, armações e muito mais.

Name: Carrboro Family Vision
Description:
For over 25 years, Carrboro Family Vision has provided exceptional eye care to Carrboro and the surrounding communities. You can visit at us at one of our two locations in Chapel Hill or in Carrboro.

We focus on considerate, consistent care utilizing the latest and greatest in technology and optical materials. CFV can handle all your eye care needs; from glasses and contacts to medical visits or optometrist specialty care.

Distinct from chain operations or impersonal corporate practices, our independent approach to optometry allows us to provide bespoke, meticulously designed frames and an unparalleled level of personalized care. Our devotion to being an active asset for our community means you’ll find open communication channels, with approachable staff members and optometrists eagerly awaiting to support you. 

Our doctors:
Dr. Stiegemeier,  a graduate of Ohio State University’s College of Optometry brings his expertise in glaucoma, eye teaming issues, prism, and specialty contact lenses.
Dr. Kirchmer provides comprehensive care with specialization in ocular disease, treating medical emergencies, and specialty contact lenses. She received her doctorate degree with honors at the University of Alabama Birmingham School of Optometry. 
Dr. Friel graduated with her Doctorate of Optometry from Nova Southeastern College of Optometry. She received training from specialists in the areas of primary care, retinal disease, glaucoma and anterior segment including dry eye disease. 
Dr. Vizithum is the owner and CEO of CFV. He has provided clinic care to nursing home residents, at the Durham VA Medical Center, at the Chapel Hill Aesthetic Plastic Surgery Center, and he acted as the Interim Clinic Director at TLC Laser Eye Center in Raleigh. 
Dr. Chow is a partner and co-owner at CFV. He attended the University of California at Berkeley for his undergraduate and Doctorate of Optometry, and has received awards for graduate research in diabetes and patient communication skills.

Name: Envision EyeCare for All
Description: Envision Eye Care for All is a 501c3 non-profit mobile vision clinic, founded to address the inequities that exist in accessing primary eye health and vision services in underserved populations throughout rural Oregon.  Through research we know uncorrected vision problems impact academic success, employment, independence and the ability to thrive on a daily basis.  Our mobile eye clinic brings comprehensive eye care and glasses directly to patients in their place of connection (community health centers, school-based health centers, migrant farm camps, native American villages, etc).

Name: Vista Ophthalmics
Description: VISTA Ophthalmics is a forward-thinking collaboration of eye doctors and industry experts with a track record of successfully turning concept into reality. By partnering with fellow doctors, we use our experience to remove the common roadblocks that keep innovative ideas from reaching the market, where they will ultimately benefit eye care providers and patients across the globe.

Name: CITYMAX OPTICIANS
Description:
Citymax group started in the year 1994 at Karunagappally 
We started our business to offer a functionable, affordable, unforgettable experience to anyone who enters the doors to one of our eye care practices.
Over the years, many things have grown — our number of locations, our technology, our ability to provide an unmatched eyewear shopping experience — but our mission has stayed the same: at Citymax opticians, we strive to provide value in every aspect of our customers’ care.
At Citymax Opticians we have your vision at heart. Our mission is to provide you with quality eye care, eye wear and customer service. We continuously improve ourselves and our skills with frequent training. 
We aim to make every experience with us enjoyable, from a simple eye examination and selecting a frame with you to express your personal style.
With our brands and stores steadily growing with your support, our vision is to eliminate poor quality eye care and eye wear in India
As always, customer satisfaction is our priority. Our team of optical professionals are dedicated to helping you find your perfect fit. For added convenience, we are continually expanding our locations, so check back regularly for a new store near you.
Citymax opticians is the ultimate destination for all your optical needs. With the largest and best selection of designer frames and lenses, you’ll always be able to find the perfect pair for you.

Name: OttO Visuelles Kompetenz Zentrum
Description:
Die Lebensfreude und die Wahrnehmung sind unmittelbar miteinander verknüpft.

OttO - Visuelles Kompetenz Zentrum hat sich als Ziel
gesetzt diese Lebensfreude im Zusammenspiel mit der visuellen Wahrnehmung zu fördern und zu erhalten. 
Wir kümmern uns von Anfang bis Ende persönlich um die individuellen Herausforderungen im Bereich des Sehens. Mit modernsten Geräten schauen wir auf die Gesundheit Ihrer Augen. Für bessere Sehqualität und zur Früherkennung von Augenkrankheiten. Für die meisten Menschen ist gutes Sehen selbstverständlich - zumindest solange, bis die Sehkraft nachlässt, eine Erkrankung der Augen diagnostiziert wird oder eine Verletzung eintritt.

Über die Augen nehmen wir unsere Umwelt wahr, die Schönheit der Natur, ein gutes Buch, sportliche und berufliche Herausforderungen. Sehen ist auch ein Teil unserer Kommunikation und trägt maßgeblich zu unserer Wahrnehmung bei. Sehen ist auch ein Teil unserer Kommunikation und trägt maßgeblich zu unserer Wahrnehmung bei.

Name: The Eye Piece
Description:
The Eye Piece is Australia’s finest independent optical practice, redefining the eyewear experience through world-class vision care and curated luxury.

With boutique locations in Sydney CBD, Wahroonga, and Balmain, we blend precision optometry with a globally sourced selection of designer eyewear. Our store-in-store brand experiences include CHANEL, LINDBERG, Tom Ford, Oliver Peoples, Mykita, Moscot, Masunaga, Cutler and Gross, Jacques Marie Mage, Chrome Hearts and much more.

We proudly lead the future of independent optometry—where craftsmanship meets innovation and style.

Name: Coaches and Mentors in Optics (CaMiO)
Description:
CaMiO is a new initiative for the optical profession.

This is a peer group for all professionals in the UK optical industry involved in activities that look after all co-workers. 

It is an open group, meeting online every couple of months.

We’ll be discussing people related issues: wellbeing, mindset, burnout, boredom, emotional intelligence, psychological safety, meditation, listening, curiosity, connection, and anything else that keeps us all in peak condition to be the best version of ourselves, for both ourselves and those we serve - our peers and patients. 

If you’d like to get involved please contact Peter Greedy - we welcome anyone who shares our passion for our collective wellbeing. 

***STRICTLY NO SELLING OR LEAD ENQUIRIES TO THIS PAGE***
***Commercial enquiries only if interested in sponsoring the work of CaMiO***

Name: Eyes on Park
Description:
Eyes On Park uses state-of-the-art technology to provide best-in-class eye care residents in Gramercy Park in New York City. Experienced optometrist Irina Shiyan, OD, offers comprehensive eye exams — including both adult and pediatric eye exams — to help everyone attain optimal eyesight with contact lenses, glasses, and progressive lenses. A wide selection of fashionable frames allows individuals to bring their own sense of style to their eyewear. 

Eye health is just as important as eyesight, which is why the team also offers eye disease diagnosis of conditions like dry eyes, macular degeneration, and diabetic retinopathy as well as treating eye infections like conjunctivitis. 

Eyes on Park helps children and adults see better while improving eye health and preventing eye disease. With regular comprehensive eye exams and acute eye care as needed, New York City families can rely upon Eyes on Park for all-encompassing eye care. 

Eyes on Park welcomes new and existing patients. Call the office or click on appointment scheduling link to book an exam now.

Name: Cynard Eye Clinic
Description:
Here at Cynard Eye Clinic, we understand the critical role your eyes play in your daily life. Hence, we are very committed to caring for and preserving your sight by the use of most recent technology and research to diagnose and manage conditions of the ocular and visual systems.

Our services are provided to private individuals, corporate bodies and HMOs.

VISION STATEMENT:
To be an eye clinic of choice in Nigeria, taking the lead in technology, research and development within the eyecare subsector.

MISSION STATEMENT:
To provide a world class comprehensive and accessible eyecare to both our corporate and private patients using our state-of-the-art equipment; backed with most recent research; through courteous, friendly and competent staff.

OUR SERVICES:
With over 13 years of clinical practice, you can trust us with:
•	Refraction and optical dispensing

Name: Chittick Eye Care
Description:
The Doctors and Staff of Chittick Family Eye Care strive to provide each patient with excellence in vision and eye health care.

We guarantee our constant commitment to the visual wellness of our patients by extending thorough diagnostic and therapeutic eye care, by emphasizing personalized service, and by never compromising materials, value, or professionalism


Chittick Family Eye Care provides superb care for your eyes. From contacts, glasses and LASIK consultation to pediatric eye care, cataracts and vision therapy, we provide comprehensive care for the eye care of your entire family.

Name: Vision Excellence Optometry & Orthokeratology
Description:
Since we established Vision Excellence in the Hills District, our commitment has always been to ensure that the health of your eyes is checked thoroughly by your optometrist and safeguarded for your future.
We believe that everyone should see an optometrist for an eye test at a relatively young age, even if you are satisfied with your vision. This allows us to make sure that your eyes are healthy and working effectively, and more importantly enables us to obtain baseline readings, measurements and images with which we can compare the condition of your eyes in the future. All of our records are saved securely on and off site locally in the Hills District.
We strive to provide excellence to each and every person who entrusts their vision and the vision of their family to our optometrist’s care with the goal of delivering the absolute best vision that your eyes are able to achieve. We want to ensure that we reduce the risks to your vision through detection and prevention of the many eye diseases that can cause blindness if discovered too late.
Our experience in optometric technology gives us a great platform to continuously provide excellence in eye care instrumentation. Our aim is to stay at the forefront of clinical equipment to make sure that we remain second-to-none in the Hills District in providing the latest eye care that technology can offer.
We are not located in a busy high-rent shopping centre. Quality of care is important to our optometrist. We take our time to check your eyes thoroughly and aim to get your prescription correct first-time. We appreciate a challenge and have developed a reputation of looking after patients whose vision has been thrown in the ‘too-hard-basket’ elsewhere.
Every patient is treated as an individual by our optometrist and we appreciate that our patients refer others to us. We believe that recommendation through word-of-mouthis the healthiest foundation on which to build our practice.

Ne mândrim că putem realiza ochelari personalizați oferind clienților noștri garanția acomodării indiferent de vârstă, rama aleasă sau lentile. 

Copiii se bucură de o atenție specială din partea echipei Thera Optic Med. Peste 200 de modele de rame sunt atent selecționate pentru a îndeplinii toate nevoile micuților. 

Toate produsele au garanție 24 de luni, iar reparațile se fac pe loc. 

Standardul de calitate pe care îl menținem determină clienții să ne recomande fără rezerve.

Dacă și-am trezit curiozitatea și vrei să afli mai multe despre sănătatea ochilor tăi, te așteptăm pe Str. Nicolae Iorga, nr. 54 sau contactează-ne.

Description:
About us
Vision Care stands for a first class optometric service which includes a comprehensive eye test, retina check-up, inner ocular pressure measurement, slit lamp examination, binocular test and many more.

But we also have the know-how of making glasses according to very high standards. Prescription glasses/sunglasses can be cut within 1hour.

Vision Care Seychelles is a chain of optical stores specializing in optometric services, as well as selling spectacle frames, lenses and contact lenses.

Since opening our doors in 2002, we have been offering comprehensive eye tests by highly qualified optometrists, which includes medical history, refraction, binocular vision tests, health exam of both the anterior and interior of the eye and colour vision tests.

We also screen for eye diseases such as glaucoma, Diabetic Retinopathy, Uviitis, conjunctivitis, cataracts and other abnormalities. Referrals to the Eye Clinic are given if any eye diseases/conditions are detected during the eye examinations.

At Vision Care Seychelles we provide our clients with the best guidance on the type of lenses required to cater for all their visual needs, be it at home, at work or even for their favorite sporting activities.

Name: Ballet des Sens,Kieffer Clarisse
Description:
Yeux secs, qui piquent, maux de tête après les écrans ?

Pendant mes années d’exercice en tant qu’opticienne, j’ai vu à quel point la fatigue visuelle, la sécheresse oculaire et le stress pouvaient peser sur le quotidien. 
Voir vos yeux tiraillés et vos visages marqués par la tension m’a touchée profondément. J’ai alors ressenti l’envie sincère de vous apporter un soulagement naturel et un véritable moment de bien-être.
 C’est là que j’interviens.
J’ai créé Ballet des Sens, un espace chaleureux dédié à la réflexologie oculaire, plantaire et palmaire.

Ma mission : apaiser vos yeux , relâcher vos tensions et rétablir l’équilibre de votre corps et de votre esprit.

La réflexologie oculaire  cible des points précis autour des yeux pour apaiser les muscles, réduire la fatigue visuelle, calmer les maux de tête et la sécheresse oculaire.
Combinée à la réflexologie plantaire , elle agit en profondeur sur le stress, le sommeil, la circulation et les douleurs, pour un mieux-être durable.

Chaque séance est une pause douce pour retrouver un regard plus clair , un corps plus léger  et un esprit apaisé.

Vous reconnaissez-vous dans ces signes de fatigue et de tensions ?

Je serais ravie d’échanger avec vous et de vous faire découvrir comment la réflexologie oculaire peut transformer votre quotidien.

Met onze jarenlange ervaring in de optiek en in het ziekenhuis bent u gegarandeerd van maximale oogzorg en een correcte aanmeting van uw bril of contactlenzen.

Inserida numa das construções mais emblemáticas da cidade, o Hotel Garantia, nome que se deveu à figura de Amadeu Mesquita e à Companhia de Seguros Garantia, aproveitando a estrutura do antigo Hotel Vilanovense.

Unsere Kernkompetenzen:
- Kontaktlinsen-Neuanpassungen bei allen Arten von Fehlsichtigkeiten
- Kontaktlinsen-Neuanpassungen bei medizinischen Indikationen
- Kontaktlinsen-Zweitmeinung und Nachversorgung
- Anpassung von Ortho-K Linsen (Nachtlinsen)
- harte/ halbharte/ formstabile Linsen
- Sportlinsen
- individuelle Weichlinsen bei Hornhautverkrümmung und bei Wunsch mit Lesekorrektur
- Analyse und Beratung bei trockenen Augen
- Brillenglasbestimmung
- Myopiekontrolle bzw. Abbremsen der Zunahme einer Kurzsichtigkeit
- Keratokonus-Linsen
- prothetische Linsen und Schalen (nach Abdruck des Auges)
- Sklerallinsen
- Optometrie
- Augen-Checkup 40+
- Augendruck und Netzhautbeurteilung mit optischer Kohärenztomographie OCT, Gesichtsfeldmessung

Was umfasst eine Kontaktlinsen-Anpassung?

- Anamnese bzw. Erfassung von Gesundheits- und Augenzustand, Sehanforderungen in Beruf und Hobby, bisherige Erfahrungen mit Brillen und Kontaktlinsen
- Klinische Prüfung des Auges: Lider, Bindehaut, Hornhaut, Tränenfilm, Iris, Augenlinse, Glaskörper, Netzhaut mit Sehnerv
- Bestimmung der optimalen Korrektion und messen von verschiedenen Sehfunktionen
- Prüfung der Kontaktlinsen-Verträglichkeit
- Evaluation des optimalen Kontaktlinsensystems bzw. Bestimmung der individuellen Parameter: Form, Material, Beschichtung, Austauschintervall, Pflegemittel
- Instruktion bezüglich Einsetzen, Herausnehmen und im Umgang mit den Kontaktlinsen und den Pflegemitteln (Hygiene)
- Kontrolle der Augen (-gesundheit) und der Kontaktlinsen in individuellen Intervallen

Freude am Sehen mit der passenden Kontaktlinse. Ein Leben lang.

Name: PBO Group
Description:
At Paterson Burn Optometrists, we believe healthy vision is the foundation for a full and vibrant life. Founded in 1925, we’re proud to be one of New Zealand’s largest independent optometry groups — offering world-class care with the personal touch of a local practice.

Our team combines cutting-edge diagnostics and lens technology with genuine Kiwi hospitality. From comprehensive eye examinations and glaucoma screening to expert frame and lens consultations, we provide complete eye-care solutions for the whole family. We’re committed to your long-term vision health — not just a single visit — and we actively support our communities through school programs, sports sponsorships, and eyewear donations.

Core Services:
• Full-scope eye examinations and retinal imaging
• Contact lens fitting and management
• Designer frames, sunglasses, and high-performance lenses
• Advanced diagnostics: retinal imaging, corneal topography, visual fields, glaucoma screening
• Family-friendly service for children through seniors

Mission:
To deliver exceptional, independent eye care — putting people first, embracing innovation, and giving back to the communities we serve.

Values:
• People-centred – We see you, not just your eyes.
• Excellence – Precision care through modern diagnostics and craftsmanship.
• Integrity – Independent advice focused on your eye health.
• Community-minded – Supporting local growth and well-being.

Key Milestones:
Established in 1925, Paterson Burn has grown across Waikato, Bay of Plenty and Auckland, recognised for volunteer initiatives such as the Open Eye Program for Special Olympics athletes and continuous investment in advanced diagnostic technology.

Call to Action:
Ready to see the difference? Book your next eye health check-up or visit your nearest branch today.

Name: SIX SIX Store
Description:
Six Six is a new kind of eyewear and optical destination.
Founded by Emma and Nat, who bring over 25 years of wholesale and retail expertise across APAC, and advanced clinical optometry experience, Six Six combines industry knowledge with a vision to reshape what eyewear retail can be. The name itself comes from the measure of perfect sight (the metric equivalent of 20/20 vision) and reflects a mission to deliver clarity with both style and substance. The first location opens on Little Collins Street in Melbourne’s CBD in late 2025, with plans to scale nationally as the brand grows.
At the heart of Six Six is a carefully choreographed journey. Customers are hosted rather than processed, moving seamlessly from welcome and browsing through to private consultation, precision fitting, and thoughtful aftercare. This approach blends best-in-class eye care with the refinement of luxury fashion and hospitality. The interiors, service touchpoints, and even product curation are designed to slow down the experience, allowing space for individuality, connection, and discovery. Over time, the brand will expand beyond eyewear into complementary categories such as leather goods, jewellery, and fragrance, extending this sense of considered lifestyle into new arenas.
Six Six sets out to redefine optical retail in Australia. Where most practices feel dated, clinical, or transactional, Six Six offers something immersive, stylish, and human.
It is built for style-conscious professionals, CBD shoppers and tourists who value design and personal service. The goal is to create a nationally recognisable brand
that stands as a new benchmark: luxurious yet approachable, immersive yet efficient, style-forward yet personal. Six Six is a place where eye care feels elevated, retail feels curated, and time spent becomes part of the experience.

Welcome to Mobile Eyez Optical LLC, your trusted partner in vision care right here in Justin, Texas. We are more than just an optical business; we are dedicated to enhancing your vision and eye health while providing the convenience of digital eye examinations.

Our Story

Mobile Eyez Optical was born from a passion for exceptional eye care and a commitment to innovation. Founded in the heart of Justin, Texas, by Tiffany Bonilla, a visionary entrepreneur, and a dedicated team of optical experts, we embarked on a journey to revolutionize how eye care is delivered.

Vision and Mission

Our Vision: To be the premier mobile optical service provider in Texas, delivering accessible, high-quality eye care to every doorstep.

Our Mission: We aim to improve the visual well-being of our community by offering cutting-edge optical solutions combined with a personal touch that exceeds expectations.

Why Choose Mobile Eyez Optical?

Convenience: We bring the eye examination to you. No need to travel; we come to your home or office, making eye care more accessible and time-saving.

Advanced Technology: Our digital eye examinations utilize state-of-the-art technology to provide accurate and comprehensive results, ensuring the best possible care.

Personalized Care: We believe in personalized care tailored to your unique needs. Our experienced optometrists take the time to understand your vision requirements.

Quality Eyewear: Beyond examinations, we offer a curated selection of stylish and high-quality eyeglasses and contact lenses, enhancing your vision with style.

Community Engagement

At Mobile Eyez Optical, we're more than just a business; we're part of the Justin community. We actively engage in local events, support charitable initiatives, and are committed to giving back to the community that has welcomed us with open arms.

Join Us in Building a Brighter Future!

Pružamo stručnu uslugu iz područja optike, optometrije i slušne akustike:

Name: Óptica S. Vicente Optivisão Covilhã
Description:
João Fernando Martins Pereira surgiu como empresário em 1962, quando em sociedade com Joaquim Meruje, fundaram a Meruje & Ca. Esta tinha sede social na Rua Conselheiro António Pedroso Santos, na zona denominada São Vicente, designação que deu origem ao nome da ótica.
Passados 10 anos - 1972 - Fernando Pereira torna-se empresário em nome individual e com o objetivo de privilegiar a sua empresa, foi alterando a sua localização, encontrando-se atualmente a funcionar, no Pelourinho no Edifício Sporting (Sede) e na Av. da Anil (filial).

•	Iniciámos no ramo da Óptica em 1962 na Covilhã “freguesia de S. Vicente”.
•	No início existiam apenas 3 Ópticas na Covilhã e nós fomos uma delas.
•	No ano de 1964 transferimos o nosso estabelecimento para a rua Rui Faleiro. 
•	Posteriormente em 1966 mudámos para a rua Visconde da coriscada (no denominado prédio Sol Neve), onde nos mantivemos durante várias décadas.
•	Tivemos também Filiais abertas na zona da estação e na freguesia do Tortosendo.
•	Atualmente, há cerca de 20 anos, para além da Filial que mantemos na Av. da Anil - Covilhã – temos o nosso estabelecimento principal (Sede) no Edifício Sporting – Pelourinho - junto ao Novo Banco.

Name: Quality Eye Care Clinic & Spa
Description:

Our eye doctors are committed to being up-to-date on the newest and best treatments and technologies. We always invest in the latest equipment available in the market to assist us in diagnosing and treating most eye conditions and providing an effective quality eye care to our patients. Dr. Hajali is also involved in research projects to assist in finding new treatments for several retinal diseases.
In our practice, you will get a comprehensive eye examination and you will be able to get your contact lenses and glasses at one place for your convenience within a very reasonable time. We carry a wide selection of glasses of several brand names, and we also accept most vision and medical insurances including Medicare and Medicaid.
The combination of our experienced doctors and our excellent customer service provided by our friendly staff make Quality Eye Care Clinic the right place for you to choose to get your eye examination and a high-quality service.

Name: Maison Lunettes
Description:
Bij Maison Lunettes kan u terecht voor brillen, zonnebrillen en contactlenzen. Wij hebben een groot assortiment kwalitatieve en stijlvolle monturen. Wij geven deskundig advies bij elke aankoop. De oogmetingen gebeuren met de modernste apparaturen. Een nieuwe bril kiezen bij Maison Lunettes gebeurt op een huiselijke en rustige sfeer. Dat is uniek als optiek in Oostende en Merelbeke. Vertrouwen in de persoon die jou iets aanprijst staat bij ons centraal. Een klant ziet een bepaalde soort nieuwe bril graag, maar past er niet altijd mee. Het is dan aan ons om het juiste advies te geven op vlak van functionaliteit en esthetiek. Bovendien streven wij naar perfectie op het gebied van oogzorg en oogmode! Vroeger moest een bril vooral functioneel zijn. Tegenwoordig zijn de brildragers op zoek naar iets unieks. Bij Maison Lunettes vind je tijdloze, eigentijdse en trendy brillen van hippe ontwerpers. De collecties, die je bij Maison Lunettes vindt, groeien nog steeds. Wij bieden een mooi assortiment aan met merken zoals Theo, Anne et Valentin, Blake Kuwahara, Götti, Odette Lunettes, Tom Ford, Etnia, Robert La Roche, Porsche Design en Kuboraum.

Daarnaast kan je bij Maison Lunettes ook terecht voor zonnebrillen en sportzonnebrillen op sterkte. De ervaren optometristen voeren oogmetingen en contactlensaanpassingen uit met de meest moderne meetapparatuur. Een nieuwe bril afstellen is een kunst. Het slijpen van de glazen en de herstellingen gebeuren vakkundig in ons atelier.
Ben je op zoek naar een nieuwe montuur? Via de website kan je onze collecties bewonderen.

Name: Optical World Leyton
Description:
Optical World Opticians, formerly known as Phillips Opticians, has a storied history dating back to its founding in 1948. Our legacy as a prominent eyecare institution is built on a foundation of excellence and dedication to serving our valued customers. We take great pride in offering a range of exceptional vision solutions and personalized services that cater to your unique eyecare needs.

Our team of experienced professionals is committed to ensuring the health and well-being of your eyes. We offer comprehensive eye exams that utilize the latest advancements in technology to accurately assess your vision and overall ocular health. Whether you're in need of new eyeglasses, contact lenses, or other eyewear, our extensive selection is sure to meet your preferences and style.

At Optical World Opticians, we understand that clear and comfortable vision is essential for your daily life. That's why we combine our expertise with cutting-edge technology to provide you with the best possible eyecare experience. Our goal is to not only meet but exceed your expectations, ensuring your satisfaction with every visit.

With a commitment to maintaining optimal eye health and enhancing your visual experience, we invite you to become a part of our legacy of care, expertise, and quality eyewear selection. Discover the difference that decades of experience and dedication can make – visit Optical World Opticians today.

Name: Clinique Visuelle du Trait-Carré
Description:
La clinique visuelle du Trait-Carré est fièrement établie dans le quartier depuis plus de 30 ans. Nous comptons une équipe exceptionnelle, composée d'optométristes, d'opticiens d'ordonnances qualifiés, d'assistantes certifiées, d'assistantes optométristes et de réceptionnistes. Nos bureaux sont situés dans une zone facilement accessible, proche des transports en commun et disposant de facilités de stationnement.

En plus de prodiguer des examens de la vue complets et des services d'optique pour toute la famille dans une ambiance chaleureuse, notre lunetterie présente une collection de plus de 1000 montures claires et solaires, mettant à disposition de nos clients une vaste sélection de produits de qualité.

À la Clinique Visuelle du Trait-Carré, nous accordons une grande importance au bien-être de nos employés. Nous offrons certains avantages sociaux en matière de produits ophtalmiques pour vous-même et vos proches. Nos salaires sont compétitifs et dépassent ceux de l'industrie, reconnaissant ainsi la valeur de notre équipe dévouée.

Nous proposons des horaires flexibles permettant à nos employés de trouver un équilibre entre leur vie professionnelle et personnelle. 

Loin des grandes chaînes commerciales, nos valeurs d'entreprise sont l'écoute, la transparence, l'engagement, la famille et l'inclusion. La mission de l'entreprise est d'ailleurs d'optimiser la vision de nos patients en les traitant comme des membres de notre famille. 

Nous sommes fières d'être une entreprise dirigée par des femmes ayant longue tradition d'excellence dans le domaine de l'optique, et nous sommes déterminées à continuer d'offrir des services de qualité tout en prenant soin de notre personnel qui joue un rôle essentiel dans notre réussite.

Name: Boday Bulloni AG
Description:
Unser Slogan lautet seit Jahrzehnten «Boday Bulloni – brillante Brillen». Darunter verstehen wir die besten Brillen für unsere Kundinnen und Kunden. Diese können den Namen einer grossen Marke tragen. Solche gibt es bei uns. Aber nicht nur. Denn unser Anspruch ist ein anderer, höherer: Wir finden für Sie die Brille, die Sie vielleicht nicht gesucht haben. Die Sie dann aber nicht mehr hergeben möchten.

Solche Lieblingsstücke werden oft von kleineren, bloss einem ausgewählten Kreis von Einkäufern und Kundinnen bekannten Designern und Manufakturen entworfen oder hergestellt. Manchmal handelt es sich dabei um alteingesessene Firmen, manchmal um Jungunternehmen. Wir finden solche Angebote in der Schweiz, aber auch im Ausland. Wir durchsuchen dafür unsere Branche mit weit offenem Visier. Und stellen nur eine Forderung, damit wir eine Brille einkaufen: Sie muss für mindestens eine Kundin oder einen Kunden die beste der Welt sein.

Name: Dr. Gafas Optica
Description:
Hola somos Dr. Gafas Optica, tu aliado en salud visual para tu empresa y tu equipo de trabajo!
En Dr. Gafas Óptica, nacimos en el año 2020 con el firme propósito de apoyar y solucionar las necesidades visuales de las personas en un contexto desafiante como lo fue la pandemia. Desde entonces, nos hemos especializado en la atención de equipos de trabajo a nivel corporativo y empresarial, llevando la atención y el servicio al cliente al más alto nivel.

Nuestro compromiso es serio y responsable: queremos que cada paciente sienta que es importante para nosotros. Por eso, brindamos un servicio integral que incluye:

*Atención personalizada por parte de profesionales idóneos en salud visual.
*Examen visual sin costo para todos los colaboradores de las empresas con las que trabajamos.
*Descuentos exclusivos en lentes, monturas y otros servicios.
*Ampliación de beneficios a grupos familiares.
*Atención domiciliaria directamente en la sede de tu empresa o lugar de residencia de tu colaborador, evitando desplazamientos innecesarios.

Contribuimos en la mejora de la salud visual de los colaboradores de tu empresa, lo que se traduce en una mayor productividad y bienestar, asi tu equipo de trabajo sentirá que su salud integral es importante para toda la organización.

Nos interesa fortalecer relaciones comerciales sólidas y saludables con todos nuestros clientes, basándonos en la confianza y el mutuo beneficio.. 

Dr. Gafas Óptica: Tu aliado estratégico en salud visual.

Contáctanos y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a cuidar la salud visual de tu equipo de trabajo.

Name: brüle
Description:
Náš příběh začal v červnu 2024, kdy jsme se rozhodli, že chceme naše zaměstnání dělat jinak. Odešli jsme z korporací a založili firmu vlastní

Chceme naši práci dělat poctivě, kvalitně, s úctou a respektem k zákazníkům a řemeslu, kterému jsme se vyučili. Spojujeme odbornost s lidskostí - nasloucháme potřebám zákazníka a společně hledáme brýle, které padnou nejen na obličeji, ale i k osobnosti a životnímu stylu. Těší nás být lidem nablízku a hledáme individuální řešení. Víme, že návštěva optiky není jen na pár minut. Dáváme si záležet, aby se zákazník u nás cítil dobře, měl dostatek času, klidu a rád se k nám vracel. 

Naše motto je "Hezčí pohled na svět" a věříme, že ho přes brüle, které pro Vás vyrobíme, i Vy uvidíte.

Měříme zrak, nabízíme brüle dioptrické, sluneční i sportovní. Aplikujeme i prodáváme kontaktní čočky. Máme špičkové brýlové čočky i přístrojové vybavení od firmy Essilor včetně centrační věže Visioffice 3.

Name: Kuzo Eye Care
Description:
Since 2022, Kuzo Eye Care has served as a dedicated and caring provider of quality vision services to York and the surrounding communities.

As a patient, you can expect friendly and attentive care from our experienced team of eye care professionals. We leverage advanced diagnostic technology to provide modern eye care services, including comprehensive eye exams, vision correction, and more.

In addition to our eye care services, our optical department features a varied selection of designer frames and precision lenses from top brands. With guidance from our knowledgeable staff, you’ll find the look you want and the features you need.

Schedule an appointment with an experienced eye care provider at our York optometrist office and give your vision the level of care and attention it deserves.

Name: Stone Oak Vision Source
Description: Stone Oak Vision Source, located in San Antonio, Texas, is a leading optometry practice owned by Dr. Chandler R. Mann II, OD. Name: Fahrendorff Optik
Description:
Fahrendorff Optik består er din lokale optiker placeret med 2 butikker i Sønderjylland. I sønderborg har vi været repræsenteret i over 12 år, og det er også her at du finder navngiverende til vore butikker; Jens Fahrendorff. 

I 2018 kom vi så til i Aabenraa da vi overtog Lægehuset Optik, som har været på samme placering siden 1970, og altid har været den lokale optiker i byen. Her finder du Jens Engel og Martin Stauner, som i fælleskab driver butikken. 

Hos os finder du det det gode håndværk som det altid har været, og selvom god service i dag er en grundforudsætning, så forsøger vi altid at give vore kunder en WAUW-oplevelse og det er bare i vores DNA. 

Vi er førende og en af de billigste af brilleleje konceptet, som er en mulighed for dig at have alle de briller du vil, til samme faste lejepris hver eneste måned. Det giver dig gennemsigtighed med hvad du betaler for dine briller, og er uheldet ude er der indbygget forsikring i dit abonnement så det næsten ikke koster dig noget hvis de gør i stykker. 

Vi arbejder helt uafhængigt af kædesamarbejde, og det giver os en stor fleksibilitet i forhold til vores indkøb. Det er nemlig således at vi selv udvælger hvert eneste stel der er udstillet, så det macther vores kunder ønsker, og ikke mindst nye trends indenfor farver og former. Vi deltager ofte på både nationale såvel som internationale messer, så vi altid er med på hvad der ønskes.

Name: Radue Optometrists
Description:
Our journey began in Qonce (formerly King Williams Town) with Mr. Don Parker, a dedicated optician who established the original practice. In 1976, Dr. Chris Faul joined and expanded our reach to Stutterheim and Alice.

With Mr. Parker's retirement in 1985, Mr. Dean Radue took the helm, enhancing our services and opening new branches. By 1990, Mr. Radue became the sole owner, driving innovation with updated equipment and further expansions, including branches in Port Alfred, Peddie, and Cambridge, East London.

In 2012, we acquired V and T Optometrists, originally founded by Mr. David Veen in the 1970s and expanded by Mr. Mike Thomlinson. This acquisition extended our footprint from Vincent to Butterworth and into the former Transkei.

Our growth continued with the addition of Mr. Marnus Dames in 2010, who later became a partner. In 2021, we opened Radue and Dames Optometrists in Komani (formerly Queenstown), solidifying our presence inland.

From Qonce to Komani, our commitment to providing exceptional, professional eye care remains unwavering. Discover how our long-standing tradition of excellence can serve your vision needs.

Name: Beyond City Limits
Description:
Beyond City Limits is a forward-thinking initiative dedicated to engaging future optometrists with the often-overlooked potential of practicing in rural Ontario. The group organizes socials three times a year in Waterloo, providing a platform for meaningful discussions about the hidden value of working beyond the urban centers. These gatherings primarily serve an educational purpose, aiming to raise awareness of the significant impact optometrists can have in underserved rural communities. They highlight how increased access to eye care is vital for countless individuals who currently lack such services.

The group has no expectations beyond fostering good conversations and sharing an incredible experience. Its mission is to illuminate the fulfillment and professional satisfaction that comes with practicing in rural areas, as opposed to the hectic nature of city life. Their efforts not only enrich the careers of participating optometrists but also profoundly benefit rural communities by increasing access to necessary eye care. Through these discussions, "Beyond City Limits" aspires to inspire future optometrists to consider the rewarding and impactful opportunities available in rural Ontario, ultimately enhancing healthcare accessibility across the region.

Name: Michigan Contact Lens
Description:
Michigan Contact Lens is a leading provider of specialized contact lenses in Metro Detroit. With their commitment to providing the latest in contact lens technology, Michigan Contact Lens is dedicated to helping their clients see clearly and comfortably. They specialize in fitting specialty contact lenses, including scleral lenses, hybrid lenses, and custom soft contact lenses.

Scleral lenses are larger than traditional lenses and vault over the cornea to rest on the whites of the eyes. This design provides comfort and visual clarity, even for those with irregular corneas or other eye conditions. Hybrid lenses combine the comfort of soft lenses with the clarity of rigid lenses, making them an excellent option for individuals who have astigmatism or require multifocal lenses. Custom soft contact lenses are designed specifically for the unique needs of each individual client, ensuring the highest level of comfort and visual acuity.

In addition to fitting specialty contact lenses, Michigan Contact Lens also provides treatment for dry eye syndrome. This condition occurs when the eyes are unable to produce enough tears, causing discomfort, burning, and stinging. Michigan Contact Lens offers advanced treatments for dry eyes, including prescription eye drops and in-office procedures.

At Michigan Contact Lens, the experienced team of optometrists and opticians are committed to providing exceptional eye care to their clients. They take the time to understand each individual's needs and concerns, and work closely with them to find the best contact lens solution.

Michigan Contact Lens is conveniently located in Metro Detroit and offers flexible scheduling options to accommodate their clients' busy schedules. Whether you're in need of specialty contact lenses or treatment for dry eye syndrome, Michigan Contact Lens is the leading choice for personalized eye care in the area.

Name: Lunettes Café Metz
Description:
Lunettes Café

Lunettes Café : Une histoire de passion, d’authenticité et d’engagement à Metz

Pour commencer,

L’histoire de Lunettes Café commence en 2010, sous l’impulsion de Mathieu Chaudeur, un passionné d’optique qui a toujours été fasciné par le savoir-faire artisanal et la lunetterie.

Après plusieurs années à affiner son expertise et à créer des liens privilégiés avec les grandes marques et créateurs de lunettes, Mathieu a ouvert les portes de sa première boutique au cœur de Metz, dans un cadre à la hauteur de sa passion pour l’esthétique et la qualité : la célèbre place Saint-Louis, une place moyenâgeuse emblématique de la ville, empreinte d’histoire et de charme.

Chez Lunettes vous découvrirez les lunettes authentiques des années 50 60 70 80 et jusqu'à nos jours et vous pouvez vous faire plaisir en repartant avec vos nouvelles lunettes étonnantes, uniques et pleine d'histoire.

Les verres adaptés à votre vue sont fabriqués localement à Metz par le Laboratoire Vecteur pour vous apporter le meilleur de la technologie et de la qualité française.

En consommant local un produit Vintage, vous contribuez étalement à travailler de façon ecoresponsable, en circuit court, sans surconsommation et surproduction industrielle.

Découvrez Lunettes Café  
Place Saint-Louis à Metz.

Name: Optiker Seger - Klarsynt
Description:
Vi är en del av Klarsynt och finns i Örebro, Kumla & Hallsberg. Hos oss har vi alltid Legitimerad Optiker på plats och alla delar synundersökningen genomförs av våra erfarna Legitimerade Optiker. Hos oss avsätter vi god tid för varje enskild kund och erbjuder alltid kompletterade mätningar om behovet finns. 

Vår målsättning är alltid nöjda kunder och det finaste betyg vi kan få är återkommande kunder som rekommenderar andra att välja oss. 

Vi är ett familjeföretag som funnits flera generationer och sedan starten på 70-talet är kontaktlinser en stor del av vår verksamhet. Det gör våra Legitimerade Optiker till vana tillpassare och vi törs lova att vi har ett av marknadens bredaste urval av kontaktlinser. 

För dig som arbetsgivare kan vi hjälpa dig att se till att dina anställda har rätt glasögon på arbetet; skyddsglasögon eller terminalglasögon. Kontakta oss så berättar vi mer!

Además, ofrecemos descuentos especiales y facilidades de pago para la adquisición de lentes graduados, lentes de contacto, gafas de protección o cualquier otro producto óptico que requieran.

Con nuestras campañas de salud visual, buscamos cumplir con la normatividad vigente en materia de salud ocupacional (NOM-030-STPS-2009) prevenir accidentes laborales relacionados con la visión, incrementar la productividad y el sentido de pertenencia de los trabajadores y contribuir al desarrollo social y económico de nuestra comunidad.

Name: Dry Eye Spa of West Michigan
Description:
A unique eyecare practice, Dry Eye Spa of West Michigan is devoted solely to diagnosing and treating Dry Eye Disease, also known as Ocular Surface Disease. This common eye condition is characterized by a chronic lack of sufficient lubrication and moisture on the surface of the eye and occurs when the eye’s tear production is inadequate, or the tears evaporate too quickly, leading to discomfort, irritation, and potential damage to the ocular surface. 

People who have this disease experience daily irritations of their eyes and eyelids. Symptoms of dry eye disease can include dryness, stinging or burning sensations, redness, excessive tearing, sensitivity to light, and blurred vision. It can result from various factors, including age, environment, diet, certain medications, and underlying medical conditions, and requires treatment to alleviate symptoms and protect the health of the eyes.

Most people know when their eyes don’t feel or look healthy, but may not realize they suffer from Dry Eye Disease. Many have tried using various over-the-counter eye drops for their symptoms, but the relief is only short-term. Long-lasting relief is never achieved. Others have tried eye drops prescribed by their doctor, and although sometimes effective, they can be costly and don’t address the root cause of the problem. This can become a merry-go-round and is very frustrating for the person suffering from the condition. They eventually stop using the eye drops and become resolved to, “just living with it.” 

The landscape of Dry Eye Disease treatment is evolving rapidly, offering new hope and making a profound difference in the lives of those who suffer from this chronic condition. The longer dry eye treatments are delayed, the more severe the condition becomes and the more difficult it is to treat. Dry Eye Spa of West Michigan treats the causes, not just the symptoms.

Bay Area Optometric Council - A local affiliate of the California Optometric Association.

The Bay Area Optometric Council serves as a network and informational resource for member doctors that form its core. Originally conceived as the Bay Area Optometric Coordinating Council, the organization serves as a repository of ideas and dialogue between optometric societies in the Bay Area. 

The BAOC serves its membership of over 700 optometrists from 5 local optometric societies. The Board of Directors includes presidents of the Alameda & Contra Costa Counties, Santa Clara County, San Francisco, San Mateo County, and Redwood Empire Optometric Societies. Representatives from the California Optometric Association and UC Berkeley School of Optometry also regularly participate. 

The Bay Area Optometric Council is composed of the five local optometric societies in the San Francisco Bay Area. Whether you are a current society member, prospective member, or optometric student, we hope you find the BAOC as a valuable resource.

Name: Pediatric Optometry and Vision Care - Dr. Christine Squeri
Description:
Pediatric Optometry and Vision Care specializes in providing high quality eye care for children and adolescents. We are located at 1080 Fifth Ave, NYC.

Dr. Christine Squeri has over 20 years of experience working with and examining children and adolescents. She is passionate about bringing a new level of eye care to the Upper East Side for the many children and families in the area.

The demand on our children's eyes is higher than ever. An eye exam that is only evaluating a child's ability to see the letters on an eye chart is missing many crucial elements, including how well the eyes work together to focus, follow and track during reading and other near tasks.

At Pediatric Optometry and Vision Care, we will work closely with pediatricians, schools, teachers and other education professionals to ensure there are no refractive errors or binocular vision conditions negatively affecting your child's ability to learn.

We will offer vision therapy services for children and adults who have weak eye muscles causing eye strain, headache, loss of place while doing near work, and other symptoms caused by eye teaming disorders. Sometimes, following Traumatic Brain Injury (concussion), binocular vision disorders and other visual disturbances can occur. Vision therapy, prisms and other treatments may be warranted in these cases.
