At Myopia Care Clinic, we provide expert myopia care and orthokeratology (Ortho-K) services to help children, teens, and adults achieve clearer vision and better long-term eye health.

Our services include:

With clinics in Mount Hawthorn and Willetton, we are proud to offer myopia care to families across Perth. Led by Dr. Syafiq Kusni, M.Optom, who has helped hundreds of patients over the past six years, we are committed to providing advanced, patient-focused eye care.

At our practice, we understand the challenges that come with low vision, and we are here to help. Dr. Fakhoury is committed to providing exceptional care and support for individuals with visual impairments.

Whether you're experiencing difficulties with reading, driving, or other daily activities, we have the expertise and cutting-edge technologies to assess your vision and design personalized solutions that suit your unique needs.

Our mission is to empower you to live a more independent and fulfilling life despite your visual limitations. Through innovative treatments, specialized devices, and rehabilitation programs, we aim to maximize your remaining vision and enhance your overall quality of life.

Name: iLook Optique
Description:
At iLook Optique, we’re not your average optometry practice — we’re an experience.

Founded as a family-owned and proudly independent practice, iLook Optique brings a refreshing difference to eye care. With years of industry experience, we’ve created a space where expertise meets warmth, and where every client is treated like a VIP.

We offer more than just eyewear — we offer bespoke style and precision vision. Our carefully curated range features premium, fashion-forward optical brands, each selected with craftsmanship and individuality in mind.

What truly sets us apart is our personalised service. We take the time to understand your lifestyle, your vision needs, and your personal style — then guide you through a one-on-one journey to find eyewear that feels like you.

From detailed eye health consultations to custom-fitting your perfect frame, we’re here to elevate every aspect of your experience.

Name: Clear Horizons Optometry
Description:
Clear  Horizons Optometry was started with the vision of helping people update  their glasses and contact lens prescriptions from the comfort and  safety of their own homes, between regular in-person eye health  examinations. While many prescription-renewal services are available  online, they cannot serve patients whose prescriptions have changed, and  that’s where we come in to help.

We  are also closely monitoring rapidly developing technologies to provide  comprehensive, high-quality eye health screening at home. At-home eye  care and monitoring is simply an adjunct to in-person care, NOT a  replacement. We aim to help other eye doctors increase exam efficiency  and provide higher quality care remotely, while reserving in-person  chair time for more complicated and emergency cases.

Our  mission is to provide innovative products that enhance the quality of  life by helping people see better. Together with our partners, we offer  the most comprehensive spectrum of products and services in eye care.  Enabling us to serve our customers through the entire life cycle of  doctor/patient needs across eye diseases, vision conditions, and  refractive errors.

Name: Park Ridge Vision
Description:
Park Ridge Vision is a family oriented practice that has a special emphasis in vision development and rehabilitation. Our team cares for patients of all ages from infancy and beyond. We welcome you to join our family and experience compassionate care for the entire family.

WHAT WE TREAT: 
VISION & LEARNING 
Vision Therapy is an effective treatment for many visual processing deficits. Poor visual skills, can impact reading and difficulty with reading can make school quite miserable. That’s why we believe in the importance of a complete visual processing evaluation for any struggling student! 

THE PROGRESSIVE MYOPIA OF CENTER
We will work with you and your child to customize a treatment aimed at successfully slowing down the deterioration related to progressive myopia. Our promise to our patients is to stay vigilant in monitoring your child’s eye and vision health. Our myopia management programs are aimed at taking a proactive approach to protecting your child’s vision for a lifetime with whatever tools that we have available now and in the future. 

CONCUSSION AND TBI
Our team collaborates with neurologists, pediatricians, physical therapists, occupational therapists and other health professionals in order to provide a comprehensive approach to recovery after brain injury.

SPORTS VISION ENHANCEMENT 
Athletes work with trainers to improve strength, stamina and speed, but only the elite work with trainers to improve reaction time, depth perception and eye-hand coordination through sports vision training. Park Ridge Vision has the knowledge and technology to take your athlete’s skills to the next level.

AMBLYOPIA / LAZY EYE
Amblyopia aka “Lazy Eye” is a difficult condition for parents to identify without a professional examination. Children with amblyopia tend to look fine. The reason that children look fine is that their brain has adapted to deal with the distorted vision! If your child has been diagnosed we can help! 

Improving Lives by Improving Vision!

Name: Blinkers Eye Clinic and Optical Showroom
Description:
Regular eye check-ups with your optometrist are essential for maintaining good eye health and ensuring clear vision. During these appointments, your optometrist can detect early signs of eye diseases such as glaucoma, cataracts, and macular degeneration, which can lead to permanent vision loss if left untreated. 

In addition to checking for eye diseases, your optometrist will also evaluate your vision and prescribe corrective lenses if necessary. Dispensing glasses and contact lenses that are specifically tailored to your individual needs is important for achieving optimal visual clarity and comfort. 

Ill-fitting or incorrect prescriptions can lead to eye strain, headaches, and even cause damage to your eyes over time. At our optical business, we are dedicated to providing comprehensive eye care services and personalized solutions that cater to your unique needs. With our expert guidance and state-of-the-art equipment, we can help you maintain clear and healthy vision for years to come.

Name: LooksBrite
Description:
LooksBrite is an Eye Center equipped with  the newest technology to help prevent, diagnose, and treat a wide array of conditions. Our compassionate, bilingual staff is dedicated to ensuring that you and your family's vision is brighter.

SERVICES
Enjoy personalized vision care that will bring your life into focus:
·Complete eye exam 
·Glaucoma testing 
·Astigmatism correction 
·Dry eye diagnosis and treatment 
·Extensive collection of eyeglasses frames 
·Contact lenses 

EyeMax Vision plan available; most vision plans accepted.

WE CATER TO ALL AGES
Just like annual visits to the dentist, yearly eye exams are vital when it comes to keeping children healthy and ensuring proper development. LooksBrite Eye Center helps ensure little eyes can see clearly and are healthy. Our eye care professionals can quickly diagnose nearsightedness, farsightedness, and astigmatism; conditions that are all easily managed with prescription glasses. The future never looked so bright. 

As you get older, regular eye exams and checkups become even more important. Seniors are more prone to eye disorders such as glaucoma, cataracts, and macular degeneration. But at LooksBrite, you’re just one simple eye exam away from helping  you keep your vision crystal clear.
COME SEE US
Whether you’re new to the neighborhood or just finally finding time to get your vision checked, you’ve come to the right place. Our eyecare professionals will help you keep your eyes healthy.

Name: Eyeris The Optometrists Limited
Description:
EYERIS always aims at exceeding expectations. When you become a patient of this practice, the health of one’s eyes will be our first concern, the second being to get the best possible visual performance for all your lifestyle needs.

EYERIS is located at Harmony Centre, 43 General Mathenge Drive amidst the tranquil environs of Westlands in Nairobi.

With a team of Optometrists and Dispensing Opticians who specialize in visual correction and thorough care of the eyes, Eyeris has the latest techniques and equipment used in examining and safeguarding one's sight.  

Vision and Style being their driving words, EYERIS is committed to setting a standard of excellence. 
Some of the services and products include routine eye examinations, dispensing of spectacles by professionals who will advise you on the choice of frame with comfort and cosmesis in mind, designer and budget eyewear, contact lens fitting, including specialized lenses for astigmatism and keratoconus and low visual aids.

Eyeris prides itself by being the only practice in Nairobi that offers the Irlen Method for problems in reading, learning, attention, headaches and light sensitivity. The Iren Method corrects a unique perceptual processing problem, usually inherited, which can affect achievement, learning and performance. 

The incidence of myopia is expected to increase significantly as lifestyles change (estimated at 5 billion people by 2050)! At Eyeris, we have taken all the necessary steps to slow down the progression of myopia by offering choices in myopia management using low dose atropine eye drops and MiYOSMART spectacle lenses. 

EYERIS, the optometrists and contact lens practitioners of choice, also boasts an exclusive pediatrics section that carries a wide range of children’s eye care products.

The highly qualified and experienced team at EYERIS emulates a professional image that embraces integrity and genuine concern for the patient's wants and needs.

Herzlich Willkommen bei Binder Optik.

Als Familienunternehmen sind wir seit jeher in der Region verankert und fühlen uns dem Wohlbefinden und Sehvermögen unserer Kunden verpflichtet. Diese gewachsene Nähe ist die Basis für unseren spürbaren Mehrwert, durch den sich unsere Kunden rundum bestens verstanden und beraten fühlen. Begeisterung garantiert!

Wir legen Wert auf konsequente Kunden- und Serviceorientierung, authentisches Handwerk, modernste technische Ausstattung, Innovation und beste Preisqualität. Bei unseren Sehtests wird mit modernster 3D-Technik gearbeitet. Die Brillengläser beziehen wir von unseren langjährigen Partnern Zeiss, Hoya und Essilor, die unseren hohen Ansprüchen an Qualität gerecht werden.

2025 ist ein ganz besonderes Jahr für uns: Wir feiern 50 Jahre Binder Optik. Fünf Jahrzehnte im Zeichen von Innovation, Leidenschaft und engen Verbindungen zu unseren Kundinnen und Kunden. Was 1975 als kleines Optikergeschäft in Böblingen begann, ist heute eines der führenden Optikunternehmen in Deutschland. Eine Erfolgsgeschichte, die ohne Sie und unsere engagierten Teams nicht möglich gewesen wäre. Ihr Vertrauen motiviert uns jeden Tag aufs Neue, das Beste zu geben – getreu unserem Slogan: „Bin bei Binder.“

Name: Collin & Kirk Optometrists Thornbury
Description:
We offer comprehensive optometry examinations including a speciality contact lens fitting service.  This includes speciality lenses such as custom soft lenses for keratoconus, custom corneal RGP, corneo-scleral, hybrid and scleral lenses.  We manage a range of conditions such as the diagnosis and monitoring of keratoconus, contact lens fitting for high ametropia, keratoconus, corneal grafts, pellucid marginal degeneration, and dry eye.
The practice has been extensively upgraded with a full suite of the latest diagnostic tools including the Triton OCT (Topcon) with anterior-OCT and angiography capability, a Meridia topographer (Medmont) and the Lenstar LS900 optical biometer (Haag-Streit) for precise axial length measurements. 
We also provide a comprehensive myopia control program using the full range of myopia control treatments, including myopia control spectacles, myopia control contact lenses, atropine treatment, and orthokeratology.

Name: MYOSAVERS
Description:
Myopia is on the rise—and it’s affecting kids earlier than ever.

In urban India, the numbers are alarming: by 2050, nearly 50% of the population is expected to be myopic. 

But here’s the good news—myopia isn’t just treatable; it can be controlled.

That’s where MyoSavers comes in. 

Founded by Dr. Gautam Motwani, an expert in myopia control and orthokeratology, our mission is simple but impactful: to educate parents, doctors, and communities about the importance of early intervention.

Through advanced treatments, tailored care, and awareness programs, we aim to stop myopia in its tracks and give children a clearer, brighter future.

Because when it comes to vision, early action makes all the difference.

Our goal is to realize your idea of perfect vision in any situation – with exactly the pair of glasses that accentuates your personal aura and style.

Each need is unique.  We are prepared to meet it.

We offer customized eyewear that addresses your specific desires and requirements. In addition to the collections of such established major brands as Lindberg, Markus T. und Götti etc., we carry a wide range of eyeglass frames made by small manufacturers: Labels that are dedicated to pushing the boundaries when it comes to creating distinctive eyewear. Thus, highest-grade materials meet with contemporary design and cutting-edge technology. But we never lose sight of our overriding objective:

Fitting you with glasses that feel and look great

This applies to the frames and lenses alike. Both single vision lenses and progressive addition lenses are custom-fitted for you.  In keeping with our commitment to excellence we, your Zeiss Relaxed Vision Center in Berlin-Mitte, bank on state-of-the-art technology while also delivering superior craftsmanship. As part of our endeavor to create the perfect pair of glasses for you, we use the ultra-precise measurement and manufacturing technology, Sehen 3.0, in cooperation with Rupp & Hubrach. Indeed, the needs of each customer are unique and no eye is like the other. Your eyes are important to us. We thus also put great emphasis on highest quality, perfect fit and optimal comfort when it comes to contact lenses.

At the pulse of the times

Whether you’re looking for the latest in frame designs or technical innovations by spectacle lense manufacturers, you will always come across interesting news on our blog.  You can follow our updates conveniently via Facebook, Google+, Twitter or our RSS-Feed.

BestPractice is a modern billing partner for optometry and ophthalmology clinics. We fight to recover every dollar from both medical and vision insurance — because too many practices leave money on the table.

Name: BlephEx, LLC.
Description:
BlephEx ... The First and Only Doctor Treatment for Blepharitis
Nearly 18 Million people suffer from some type of Blepharitis or Dry Eye symptoms.  BlephEx is a in-office procedure that allows your doctor to take an active role in treating Dry Eye Disease and Blepharitis.

The BlephEx and OptiVize devices rounds out Dr. Rynerson's treatment protocol that eliminates Biofilm that causes Dry Eye Disease/Blepharitis.

Biofilm can seal off the meibomian glands and also allows bacteria to produce inflammatory toxins that results in soft tissue damage of internal lid structures including the meibomian glands. This slow inflammatory destruction of the tear glands causes Dry Eye. We need to get that biofilm cleaned off of lid margins and out of the meibomian glands which will decrease and eventually eliminate the inflammation associated with this disease. BlephEx is the first step in that process. We know this revolutionary device and treatment protocol will change the way this disease has been treated. 

Patients will finally enjoy a life free from the chronic and irritating symptoms associated with blepharitis. The BlephEx treatment is well tolerated and only takes a few minutes to perform. BlephEx can save the patient hundreds of dollars in the costs of prescription drops and artificial tears.
See your eye doctor for the latest in eyecare technology, and see if BlephEx is right for you.

● Video Centration for Digital Eyewear Dispensing

"We are convinced that our products are of real benefit across the generations and are steadily working with the aim of bringing optimal sight to as many people as possible.“ That means:
● in terms of video centration, that our customers can provide really good conditions for wearing progressive lenses by receiving precise values with our visuReal systems.
● and in terms of our low vision customers, that they get customized “Learning mates” for almost any and every need or situation. Here, our visuPlus is equipped with unique and great options for magnification, increasing contrast, and read-aloud function.
As a young company, we have close cooperation with Ollendorf Mess-Systeme, whose video centration technology was path-breaking. Its value has been positively influenced by the close cooperation with the successful and renowned lens manufacturer HOYA.
The brand visuReal implies knowledge, cutting-edge technology, reliability, and precise measurements. Our technology has been used and trusted by more than 12,000 customers worldwide.

Name: half Helen
Description:
At half Helen (hH), we exist to help our patients see the world clearly. Founded in 2013, hH started out providing vision and hearing screenings and worked to connect children in need to follow up care providers. Recently hH launched optical Prime, a mobile eye clinic that brings vision care directly to children where they are, at school.

Vision impairment is the single most prevalent disabling condition among children. One in four children has a vision problem. With 80% of learning being visual, schools conduct vision screenings for good reason. It’s not enough to identify a vision problem; 40% of children that fail a vision screening never see an eye doctor. Left untreated, uncorrected refractive errors can result in Amblyopia - the number one cause of blindness in children. Closing the access to care gap for children in low-income communities strengthens children’s social and emotional development and academic success.

Name: European Diploma in Optometry
Description:
The legal scope of practice for optometry across Europe varies from assembling spectacles to the autonomous management of eye disease. 

In 2008 ECOO established the European Diploma in Optometry as a stimulus to the harmonisation of European optometric education and clinical practice.

The European Diploma is set at least at the Bachelor level in European Higher Education or equivalent. The member countries of the European Council of Optometry (ECOO) have adopted the Diploma as the “Gold Standard” for European Optometry.

As harmonisation progresses an increasing number of schools and universities now base their curriculum on the Diploma.

Name: Insight Complete Eye Care DFW
Description:

You can trust our dedicated team and take advantage of our state of the art scanning laser diagnostic equipment and technology.

Our experienced doctors have advanced training in fitting  specialty contact lenses for cornea compromised patients. We offer a wide range of specialized medically necessary contact lens options which can often restore sight to patients. We treat a variety of conditions such as Graft versus Host Disease (GVHD), Sjogren’s Syndrome, and severe dry eyes. If you’ve experienced  a corneal transplant, been diagnosed with keratoconus, or have had complications following LASIK surgery or radial keratotomy (RK) surgery we can discuss recommendations for achieving the best vision and comfort possible. At Insight Complete Eye Care, the quality of our care is our priority and your eyesight is our passion.

At Insight Complete Eye Care, our goal is to exceed expectations in every aspect of care. We understand the emotional effect of poor vision and have many tools at our disposal to accommodate a variety of unique problems.  Offering the best, cutting edge treatments available, we look forward to improving vision and changing lives in Ft. Worth!

Name: Northern Sight Optometry
Description:

Welcome! 

Northern Sight Optometry is a full-scope optometry office and boutique optical within the beautiful growing neighbourhoods of Kleinburg and Vaughan. Our office provides comprehensive and specialty services for the entire family.

We carry unique hand-crafted eyewear, medical-based products to treat ocular conditions, and provide therapy for those with visual challenges affecting learning abilities or daily activities.

Our team focus is towards creating long-lasting connections with our patients, education on wholistic wellness and ocular health, and supporting local businesses within the community. 

Our Optometrists are Dr. Amrit Bilkhu and Dr. Manraj Fervaha.

Dr. Bilkhu lives in Vaughan and takes pride in serving her community. She strives to make every patient feel comfortable in the exam room, educates patients on the importance of an eye exam, and ensures that patients have a thorough understanding of their own medical or eye conditions for preventative care.

Dr. Fervaha grew up in Woodbridge and takes pride in being able to serve his local community while building long-lasting relationships with his patients. He is passionate about eye care and strives to place a strong emphasis on patient education and preventative care.

Name: New Path Vision
Description:
Embark on a journey to superior eye care at New Path Vision of Pottstown, where we redefine excellence in optometry! Nestled in the heart of Pottstown, PA, our private practice isn't just a destination; it's an exhilarating experience for our valued patients.

Imagine a realm where your vision is not merely cared for but elevated to unprecedented heights. At New Path Vision, we go beyond the ordinary, offering a spectrum of services that transcend the conventional boundaries of eye care. From comprehensive primary care to rapid-response emergency services, cutting-edge ocular disease diagnosis and management, innovative myopia control, and transformative dry eye treatments – we've crafted a tapestry of unparalleled care.

But that's not all – immerse yourself in the world of vision therapy, where personalized programs unlock your visual potential. Discover eyeglasses and contact lenses that aren't just accessories but extensions of your style and clarity. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in the state-of-the-art optometric technology we deploy – from the revolutionary Optos and OCT-HD to the Meibographer Topographer, UBM, OptiLight, Meiboflo, ERG, Endothelial Camera, and Tear Lab.

At New Path Vision, we don't just meet expectations; we exceed them. Step into an office where innovation meets compassion, technology meets expertise, and your vision meets its highest potential. Your journey to exceptional eye care begins here – because at New Path Vision, seeing is believing!

- Comprehensive Eye Examinations

- Specialty Lens Fits for Keratoconus and Corneal Disease
- Online Portal for e-commerce Contact Lenses delivery

Our offices strive to provide patient care in a comfortable, caring and professional manner. Our doctors work patiently to ensure that your prescription best suits your vision requirements. We take the time to fit you with the most appropriate contact lenses, and offer consultation services for various types of refractive surgery, including LASIK, PRK, WaveFront, and cataract surgery co-management. Name: Clinique Visuelle Nathalie Picard
Description:
La clinique visuelle Nathalie Picard est fièrement établie dans le quartier depuis plus de 30 ans. Nous comptons une équipe exceptionnelle, composée d'optométristes, d'opticiens d'ordonnances qualifiés, d'assistantes certifiées, d'assistantes optométristes et de réceptionnistes. Nos bureaux sont situés dans une zone facilement accessible, proche des transports en commun et disposant de facilités de stationnement.

En plus de prodiguer des examens de la vue complets et des services d'optique pour toute la famille dans une ambiance chaleureuse, notre lunetterie présente une collection de plus de 1500 montures claires et solaires, mettant à disposition de nos clients une vaste sélection de produits de qualité.

Chez Nathalie Picard, nous accordons une grande importance au bien-être de nos employés. Nous offrons certains avantages sociaux en matière de produits ophtalmiques pour vous-même et vos proches. Nos salaires sont compétitifs et dépassent ceux de l'industrie, reconnaissant ainsi la valeur de notre équipe dévouée.

Nous proposons des horaires flexibles permettant à nos employés de trouver un équilibre entre leur vie professionnelle et personnelle. 

Loin des grandes chaînes commerciales, nos valeurs d'entreprise sont l'écoute, la transparence, l'engagement, la famille et l'inclusion. La mission de l'entreprise est d'ailleurs d'optimiser la vision de nos patients en les traitant comme des membres de notre famille. 

Nous sommes fières d'être une entreprise dirigée par des femmes ayant longue tradition d'excellence dans le domaine de l'optique, et nous sommes déterminées à continuer d'offrir des services de qualité tout en prenant soin de notre personnel qui joue un rôle essentiel dans notre réussite.

Uzyskaliśmy tytuł srebrnego mecenasa kultury, za wkład w rozwój kultury i sztuki w Kaliszu. Kilka razy do roku organizujemy eventy tematyczne. Promujemy lokalne firmy i systematycznie bierzemy udział w akcjach charytatywnych na rzecz naszego regionu.  Prowadzimy profile na social mediach - nie tylko w zakresie zakupu okularów ale szczególny nacisk kładziemy na uświadamianie pacjentów na temat badań i profilaktyki raka piersi i innych istotnych kwestii.

Name: Near Vision Institute
Description: Near Vision Institute is a Washington State non-profit founded to pioneer school optometry.  We educate, provide evaluation & treatment services, develop tools, and support research into improving near vision function in literacy tasks in order to transform lives and realize human potential worldwide.  We provide clinical services in Washington State, USA through our EYE See Clinic base and mobile units.   We offer visual screenings, eye exams, eyeglasses, functional vision evaluations and therapy treatment services.  Near Vision Institute has developed an interdisciplinary collaborative toolkit and patient portal called EYE Toolbox providing online access to innovative software applications that address vision dysfunctions through remote protocols.  We provide professional training about vision issues, best practice treatment approaches, and how to use our EYE Toolbox to improve access to care worldwide.   We work collaboratively with research universities, students, and faculty on software and technology projects that can assist in bringing intervention solutions for vision issues that impact development, learning, work, and the enjoyment of life.

With over 30 years of combined experience in the optical industry between us, my2020 Optometrist is our take on what an exemplary eye care experience should look and feel like. Ottica Alta Definizione ha ampliato e rinnovato i locali per rendere ancor più funzionali e confortevoli gli ambienti destinati alla vendita, alla misurazione della vista ed all’applicazione di lenti a contatto.
La vista è il senso più complesso e noi diamo valore al dispositivo medico che ci aiuta a vedere meglio, ci protegge dai raggi del sole, ci da’ sicurezza e conferisce un aspetto sempre alla moda.
 Noi di Ottica Alta Definizione,
abbiamo al nostro interno strumentazione all’avanguardia sia per quanto riguarda la sala optometrica sia per quanto riguarda la centratura degli occhiali.
Quando si entra nei nostri punti vendita si è accolti da personale specializzato pronto a trovare soluzioni adatte alle nostre esigenze di benessere visivo.
Ottica Alta Definizione è anche attenzione alla moda ed alla tecnologia, perché gli occhiali sul viso sono tra le prime cose che si notano in ogni persona che si incontra, e servono a proteggere un dono prezioso.

Name: SQUADRAMI
Description:
Ci siamo posti l’obiettivo di essere la migliore esperienza di acquisto che tu possa avere nell’ottenere un occhiale adatto alle tue esigenze.

Per questo motivo ci impegniamo a seguirti prima dell’acquisto con una Consulenza specializzata in 3D che ti orienti verso ciò che è più giusto per te, per il tuo lavoro, per il tuo tempo libero.

Nella seconda fase e dopo l’acquisto, oltre ad un attento servizio di post vendita, ti aiutiamo ad analizzare e risolvere i problemi visivi che ogni fase della vita ti proporrà.

La nostra esperienza ci insegna che troppo spesso il cliente vive con ansia e preoccupazione il passaggio da un occhiale monofocale (per lontano) ad uno con lenti progressive (per lontano e vicino) da indossare tutto il giorno.

È proprio per questo che vogliamo offrirti la garanzia sul mancato adattamento all’occhiale da vista progressivo.
Nel caso non ti dovessi adattare all’occhiale progressivo acquistato da OtticaLAB, siamo pronti a garantirti il rimborso fino al 100%!

Ma c’è un motivo in più per il quale potresti sceglierci. Da quando abbiamo inaugurato il nostro primo negozio, fin da subito abbiamo fatto una scelta coraggiosa e ben precisa sulle montature trattate: evitare i classici brand offerti della maggior parte dei negozi di ottica.

Selezioniamo collezioni per la maggior parte di piccoli produttori italiani che costruiscono montature come si facevano una volta, “alla vecchia maniera”.

La stragrande maggioranza dei clienti che si sono rivolti a noi sono rimasti soddisfatti dell’esperienza di acquisto. Non solo dell’occhiale acquistato ma anche dell’atmosfera del negozio, delle attenzioni, dei consigli sul Visual Fitting che rendono piacevole l’acquisto della montatura e delle lenti.

Avrai notato infatti che, non a caso, tra le decine di testimonianze che i nostri clienti hanno liberamente scritto sui vari Social, quelle recensite in Google ci hanno permesso di ottenere un risultato di assoluta eccellenza.

At Best One Optics, we’re pioneers in crafting high-performance optical solutions that redefine clarity, innovation, and reliability. Description:
James Doyle Opticians, located in Wilmslow, stands as a beacon of unrivalled eye care. With a commitment to thoroughness, our dedicated team conducts comprehensive eye tests, ensuring the optimal health and protection of your vision.

Utilising cutting-edge diagnostic equipment, we go beyond mere vision correction. Name: Barbados Optometry Association
Description:
About the Optical Association of Barbados (OAB)

The Optical Association of Barbados is the national professional body representing Optometrists, Opticians, and other eyecare professionals across the island. Our mission is to advance the field of optometry in Barbados by promoting the highest standards of ethical practice, education, and clinical excellence — while safeguarding the public through accountable, quality-driven eyecare.

We are committed to ensuring that every Barbadian has access to affordable, high-quality, and comprehensive eye health services. Through collaboration with government agencies, ophthalmologists, international partners, and community stakeholders, the OAB works to influence eye health policy, strengthen professional development, and raise public awareness about the importance of regular eye exams.

Our initiatives include public outreach programs such as free eye health screenings, national awareness campaigns like World Sight Day, and continuing education opportunities for practitioners to remain current with global best practices and emerging technologies.

At the heart of everything we do is our vision to build a cohesive, forward-thinking optical community — one that embraces diversity, fosters professional growth, and keeps Barbados aligned with international standards of eyecare.

Vision: Accessible, affordable, and high-quality eyecare for all.

Mission: To protect, promote, and advance the profession of optometry in Barbados through education, ethics, and advocacy.

Our state-of-the-art technology includes advanced diagnostic tools such as visual field testing, optical coherent tomography, and Ortho K treatment, which allows us to quickly and accurately diagnose and treat a variety of eye conditions. In addition to our eye care services, we offer a wide selection of designer sunglasses, glasses, and contact lenses, including top brands such as Ray-Ban, Burberry, Hugo Boss, and many more. Our team of opticians will work with you to help you find the perfect pair of glasses or contacts to suit your needs, style, and budget. We also carry a range of eye drops and other products to help you keep your eyes healthy and comfortable. 

At Markham Stouffville Optometry, we believe in providing our patients with personalized care that meets their individual needs. Our team of experts will take the time to get to know you and your vision concerns, working with you to develop a customized treatment plan that addresses your unique needs. Whether you're in need of an eye exam, a new pair of glasses, or treatment for an eye condition, we're here to help. Visit us today and experience the difference of comprehensive eye care at Markham Stouffville Optometry!

Name: Optometric Center for Family Vision Care and Vision Therapy
Description:
Here in San Carlos, California, we change lives one pair of eyes and one person at a time. We do this by going above and beyond in how we care for and serve others. Since the 1950s, in the "City of Good Living", our office has built an outstanding reputation for providing quality personal vision care for each member of the family.

We focus on a unique emphasis of diagnosing and treating learning-related vision problems, providing specific treatments to slow the progression of nearsightedness (also called myopia control or myopia management), helping those with special needs, athletes who want to improve their performance, and those who have suffered a concussion or traumatic brain injury. In addition we provide solutions to dry red and irritated eyes.  

Through our specially trained doctors, trusted referrals from other professionals, and a blend of state-of-the-art technology, we meet the needs of thousands of families each year.  Please contact us by calling/texting 650-593-1661, or emailing us at email@familyvisioncare.org. 
We look forward to helping you see, feel and look your best!

Eye exams for all ages, including children and seniors

Diabetic eye health monitoring and OCT imaging

Contact lens fittings and renewals

Emergency eye care and red-eye evaluations

Dry eye treatment and management

Direct billing to most major insurance plans

Our clinic is conveniently located at Highway 10 and 132 Street with ample parking and evening/weekend appointments to suit your schedule.

Grundlage einer gezielten Brillenglasbestimmung ist eine umfangreiche Anamnese, 
die Erkenntnis über mögliche Sehschwächen gibt und Einfluss auf einen weiteren Verlauf, der Messung und Beratung nimmt.
Ob eine Anfertigung und Anpassung von Sehhilfen für die unterschiedlichsten Lebens- und Arbeitsbereiche oder das Einarbeiten von Brillengläsern in die jeweilige Brillenfassung. Wir finden die optimale Lösung für Sie, um unbeschwert den Alltag zu meistern.

Bei uns trifft Mode auf Qualität, denn wir bieten eine große Auswahl an hochwertigen & stylischen Brillenfassungen vieler namhafter Marken und Designer.

Auch für Ihre Kids wird die Auswahl und Anpassung einer neuen Kinderbrille zum Erlebnis. 
Auf 25 m² bieten wir Ihnen im 1.OG bei Alster Kids eine riesige Auswahl der schönsten, buntesten und auch stabilsten Fassungen für jedes Alter, wobei der Spaß nicht zu kurz kommt. 

Überzeugen Sie sich selbst, wir freuen uns auf Ihren Besuch bei Alster Optik mit Alster Kids.

Name: Asian Eyes Optical Inc.
Description:
Established in 1995, Asian Eyes Optical Inc. began as a small optical importer and distributor, focusing on colored contact lenses. Today, we are a well-established Filipino company that partners with top-tier global brands from the U.S. and Europe, delivering a comprehensive range of ophthalmic and optometry products. With over 30 years of industry experience, we have grown into a recognized leader in the vision care market.

Our product portfolio includes:

Contact Lenses & Care Products
-Ophthalmic Prescription Lenses
-Intraocular Lenses (IOLs)
-Glaucoma Implants
-Ophthalmic Eye Drops

At Asian Eyes, we prioritize high-quality, safe, and effective products to ensure the best outcomes for patients and customers. Our dedication to quality has helped us establish a strong presence in the Philippine market, competing with both local and international companies. Our products are available to a wide range of clients, including top hospitals, private eye centers, optical clinics, and major drugstore chains across the country.

We are proud to be the first contact lens importer and distributor in the Philippines to have our products registered with the Philippine FDA. This commitment to regulatory excellence ensures that all our products meet stringent safety and quality standards. We maintain a dedicated regulatory affairs team to oversee compliance and monitor FDA regulations.

Our nationwide distribution network ensures that our products are accessible to customers across the Philippines, supporting vision care needs in both urban and remote areas.

Why Asian Eyes?
-Over 30 years of trusted industry experience
-Strategic partnerships with leading international brands
-Pioneers in FDA product registration for contact lenses
-Nationwide product availability

At Asian Eyes, we remain committed to improving vision care in the Philippines, delivering the best products and services to our partners and customers

Name: Pisani & Cía.
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar que abrió sus puertas el 1 de octubre de 1962, cuando Alfredo Pisani, motivado por expandir su negocio, junto a mi padre, Oscar Canegallo, fundaron nuestra Óptica Pisani & Cía.
Con los años, mi padre compró el fondo de comercio a Alfredo y decidió continuar con el nombre de la óptica. Hoy me enorgullece continuar con Pisani & Cía., haciendo de esta óptica un espacio donde las ciencias se ponen al servicio de la salud visual de la población, perfeccionándonos en forma constante y transitando caminos de la profesión que nos ha llevado a pertenecer a una importante cantidad de entidades internacionales de la salud visual.
Desde aquí he fundado el grupo Neurar International, el cual lidero junto a profesionales de varios países, desarrollando el modelo de trabajo Brain Vision Training, intentando estar a la vanguardia, e impactar sobre los nuevos programas de Terapia Visual a nivel mundial.
Como Optometrista, me he especializado en el desarrollo de contenidos y técnicas de terapia visual dentro del ámbito de las Neurociencias y la Motricidad Humana, trabajando también, como profesor en universidades nacionales y extranjeras.
Hoy, junto a Eugenia, continuamos con el sello personal que mi padre implantó allá en 1962, viendo la vida junto a vos, que nos has acompañado durante la historia de nuestra óptica Pisani & Cía.

Mariano Canegallo

The name "Apollo Vision Haus" is a tribute to Houston's legacy of vision and innovation.  "Apollo" pays homage to the Apollo missions, a defining moment in Houston's history and a testament to the city's pioneering spirit in space exploration.  Just as the Apollo program pushed the boundaries of human vision and achievement, we aim to push the boundaries of eye care, offering advanced technology, exclusive brands, and a personalized experience that's truly out of this world.  The "Haus" element reflects our commitment to creating a welcoming and sophisticated space where you feel at home, right here in the heart of Houston.

Our philosophy is simple: See the Difference. We go above and beyond to provide exceptional service, advanced technology, and a curated selection of the world's finest eyewear brands. Name: Clear Vision Eyecare
Description:
Dr. Kosta A. Koutoulas is a licensed optometrist serving children and families in Daly City, CA. Certified in glaucoma management and specializing in myopia control, he loves helping people see clearly and comfortably. He is known for providing exceptional eye care while making his patients feel comfortable with his easygoing presence.

Dr. Koutlouas is certified to treat patients suffering from glaucoma, a disease that impacts vision by damaging the optic nerve. 

He is also certified in corneal refractive therapy, which is also known as orthokeratology (Ortho-k). This newer, non-invasive method of correcting vision in children and adults can improve sight without the use of glasses, contacts, or cornea surgery. Orthokeratology has been shown in the research to slow down progression of nearsightedness in children, especially those age 8-12 — this is age most myopia progression tends to happen.

Dr. Koutoulas tailors contact lenses to fit each eye’s unique shape. He does this using state-of-the-art technology such as Zeiss corneal topographers, which map the shape and condition of the cornea. 

He uses the Humphrey Visual Field Analyzer to diagnose eye conditions that might be affecting a patient’s optic nerve, such as glaucoma. 

Dr. Koutoulas shares all images taken in the office with patients via smartphone or email, so they can see exactly what he sees.

In 2015  we decided to change our name to match our mission. We became West  Suburban Family Vision and Therapy Center. Our vision therapy program grew too big for our space. We decided to open a new and our current therapy only center in 2020. As we opened our new space Dr. Alicia Wong joined our team. Dr. Wong achieved Board Certification in Vision Therapy in 2022. We’ve been doing vision therapy at our office nearly from the  beginning.  With each generation mentoring the next our office has over  60 years of experience. You won’t find any other office with this much  experience in vision therapy in the Chicago area.

Name: Pediatric Vision Development Center
Description:
Beyond 20/20: Specialized Vision Care for Learning, Rehabilitation, and Performance

The Pediatric Vision Development Center is a premier specialty clinic providing advanced Functional Vision Care across the lifespan. We are experts in how the eyes and brain work together, offering customized programs that go far beyond standard eye exams.

CORE SERVICES:
Comprehensive Vision Exams: These assessments cover not only eye health and prescription needs but also critical functional visual skills, ensuring the eyes are both healthy and working efficiently.

Optometric Vision Therapy: This encompasses customized, evidence-based programs designed to build and improve essential visual skills (tracking, focusing, teaming) that impact performance and daily function. This therapy is applied across several specialized areas:

>> Learning-Related Vision Therapy: We help children and adults overcome visual skill deficits that impact reading fluency, comprehension, and sustained attention.

>> Neuro-Optometric Vision Rehabilitation: We provide specialized care for visual consequences resulting from Acquired Brain Injury (ABI), including concussions, strokes, and neurological conditions, focusing on restoring function for balance, spatial awareness, and concentration.

>> Sports Vision Training: We enhance dynamic visual skills—such as reaction time, depth perception, visual tracking speed, and peripheral awareness—to give athletes of all ages a competitive edge on the field or court.

Our Mission: To unlock visual potential, improve quality of life, and ensure optimal performance through cutting-edge, comprehensive vision care protocols.

**We are actively seeking partnerships with Neurologists, Physical Therapists, Occupational Therapists, Athletic Trainers, and Educators. Connect with us to establish co-management and referral protocols.**

Vutest complies with current Government Health & Safety Regulations, ‘EYES AND EYESIGHT’ implemented for the protection of VDU operators.

EyeLab recommends FORS (Fleet Operator Recognition Scheme) the voluntary accreditation scheme for all commercial vehicle organisations, their drivers and self-employed drivers.

All Eyelab tests are online vision screening checks to find out if your vision meets the required standard for drivers and computer operators. They are not meant to replace your regular eye examination and health check by a qualified eyecare practitioner (Optometrist or Eye Doctor).

Name: EyeXpert Optical
Description:
EyeXpert | Brampton’s Corporate Vision Care & Safety Eyewear Partner

Every day in Canada, over 700 people suffer eye injuries, with a significant number occurring in the workplace. Yet, nearly 90% of these injuries are preventable with the right eye protection and vision care. At EyeXpert, we’re on a mission to protect your team’s most valuable asset: their sight.

Based in Brampton, ON, EyeXpert specializes in corporate vision care programs and prescription safety eyewear solutions designed to reduce workplace injuries and improve employee well-being. Whether your team is on the factory floor, in a warehouse, or behind a screen, our tailored services help prevent accidents, improve focus, and keep productivity sharp.

Why Vision Care Matters for Your Workplace:

1. Unseen doesn't mean unaffected: Many vision issues—like refractive errors, depth perception problems, or eye strain—go unnoticed until they impact safety or performance.

2. Early eye exams detect hidden risks: Routine exams can catch underlying vision problems and even early signs of systemic health issues (like diabetes or high blood pressure).

3. Properly fitted safety eyewear saves eyes: Comfort, clarity, and compliance matter. Employees are far more likely to wear their safety glasses when they fit well and correct their vision.

Our Services Include:

On-site or in-clinic corporate eye exams
CSA and ANSI compliant prescription safety glasses
Customized vision care plans for small and large teams
Digital eye strain consultations for screen-heavy workplaces

Partnering with EyeXpert isn’t just about ticking a compliance box — it’s about investing in your team’s clarity, confidence, and safety.

Protect vision. Promote performance. Trust EyeXpert.

Serving Brampton and the GTA |  Corporate Inquiries Welcome

Name: Augenkompetenzzentrum - Gruppe
Description:
Augenkompetenzzentrum – Wir verbinden Tradition mit Zukunft.
Das Augenkompetenzzentrum ist mehr als ein klassischer Optiker. Unser Anspruch ist es, moderne Augenoptik mit innovativer Gesundheitsvorsorge zu verbinden. Deshalb arbeiten bei uns ausschließlich ausgebildete Fachkräfte, die ihre Kund:innen nicht nur mit Brillen und Kontaktlinsen versorgen, sondern durch High-Tech-Screenings auch sofortige Checks ermöglichen – ohne monatelange Wartezeit auf einen Termin beim Augenarzt.
Ein weiterer Kern unserer Philosophie ist die Verantwortung gegenüber Qualität und Nachhaltigkeit: 50 % unserer Brillenfassungen stammen aus Deutschland. Kurze Transportwege, enge Partnerschaften mit regionalen Manufakturen und höchste Verarbeitungsstandards machen den Unterschied – für unsere Kund:innen und für die Umwelt.
Unsere Vision geht jedoch über die einzelnen Standorte hinaus. Wir wollen traditionell arbeitende Augenoptiker dabei unterstützen, ihr Geschäft zukunftssicher aufzustellen – mit digitalen Prozessen, effizienteren Abläufen und innovativen Konzepten, die echte Mehrwerte für Kund:innen schaffen. Das Augenkompetenzzentrum versteht sich damit als Partner einer ganzen Branche: regional verwurzelt, fachlich kompetent, digital führend.

Nasze wartości:

Sukces - Pomagamy naszym członkom osiągać ich cele biznesowe.

Uśmiech - Tworzymy pozytywne i wspierające środowisko.
Doświadczenie - Wykorzystujemy nasze wieloletnie doświadczenie, aby dostarczać najlepsze rozwiązania.

Nasze usługi:
Rabaty u partnerów - Korzystne warunki zakupowe dzięki współpracy z wiodącymi dostawcami.

Społeczność - Tworzymy silną społeczność, w której każdy głos ma znaczenie.
Wsparcie biznesowe - Pomagamy w zarządzaniu i rozwijaniu działalności optycznej.
Elastyczność współpracy - Dostarczamy rozwiązania dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb naszych członków.

Dołącz do Partnerskiej Grupy Optycznej OPTOM i odkryj, jak możemy pomóc Ci w osiąganiu sukcesów w branży optycznej. Razem z nami możesz sięgnąć gwiazd!

Description:
At Specs & Co, we're revolutionizing access to affordable prescription glasses through our direct-to-consumer eyewear solution. Founded with a simple yet powerful mission – ensuring everyone can experience the beauty of clear vision, regardless of their financial situation – we're bridging the gap between quality and affordability in prescription eyewear.

Our innovative approach combines ethical manufacturing in Bangladesh with direct shipping to customers in developed nations, eliminating unnecessary markups and middlemen costs. By establishing our production facilities in Bangladesh, we're not just creating budget-friendly glasses; we're generating meaningful employment opportunities in communities that need them most.

What Sets Specs & Co Apart: • High-quality prescription glasses at prices up to 90% lower than traditional retailers • Direct factory-to-consumer shipping model eliminating unnecessary costs • Ethical manufacturing providing fair wages and safe working conditions • Complete prescription eyewear starting from just $50 • Wide selection of contemporary frames for all face shapes and styles • Quality control exceeding international eyewear standards • Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

Every pair of Specs & Co glasses represents our commitment to social impact and accessibility in vision care. We believe that clear vision isn't a luxury – it's a fundamental right that enables education, employment, and the ability to fully participate in daily life.

Join us in our mission to make quality eyewear accessible to everyone while supporting sustainable development in Bangladesh. At Specs & Co, we're not just selling glasses; we're creating a clearer future for communities worldwide.

Name: Optyk Tondryk-Dymczyk
Description:
Witamy w Salonie Optycznym Tondryk & Dymczyk.

Jesteśmy profesjonalnym salonem optycznym, którego celem jest zapewnienie naszym klientom pełnego zadowolenia i najwyższej jakości usług optycznych. Nasza wizja polega na tworzeniu niepowtarzalnego doświadczenia zakupowego, w którym zdrowie i komfort wzroku stawiane są na pierwszym miejscu.

W Salonie Optycznym Tondryk & Dymczyk wierzymy, że każdy klient zasługuje na wyjątkową opiekę i indywidualne podejście. Nasz doświadczony zespół specjalistów optycznych dba o to, aby każda wizyta w naszym salonie była wyjątkowa i satysfakcjonująca. Nasze usługi obejmują profesjonalne badanie wzroku, dobór okularów korekcyjnych i słonecznych, a także dobór soczewek kontaktowych.

Dążymy do pełnego zadowolenia naszych klientów poprzez zapewnienie im doskonałej jakości usług optycznych. Nasz wykwalifikowany personel jest zaangażowany w ciągły rozwój i doskonalenie swoich umiejętności, aby móc sprostać wszelkim potrzebom naszych klientów. Stawiamy na indywidualne podejście i profesjonalizm, aby każdy klient mógł znaleźć idealne rozwiązanie dla swojego wzroku.

Jednym z naszych najważniejszych obszarów działalności jest profesjonalne badanie wzroku. Nasz zespół specjalistów optycznych korzysta z najnowocześniejszego sprzętu i technologii, aby zapewnić precyzyjne i dokładne diagnozy. Dzięki temu możemy dostosować nasze usługi do indywidualnych potrzeb każdego klienta i zapewnić im najlepszą jakość widzenia.

Zapraszamy do umówienia się na wizytę w naszym salonie i skorzystania z naszego profesjonalnego optometrycznego badania wzroku. Nasz zespół z przyjemnością pomoże Ci w doborze odpowiednich rozwiązań optycznych, które spełnią Twoje oczekiwania i poprawią jakość Twojego widzenia.

Skontaktuj się z nami już dziś i pozwól nam zadbać o Twój wzrok!

Name: Eyecare Associates of Roanoke
Description:
Eyecare Associates of Roanoke is officially accepting new patients!

Who are we and why did we come to Roanoke?

Our sister practice, Eyecare of Associates of Bluffton, was established over 90 years ago, with Dr. Richard Schamerloh joining the practice in 1993, Dr. Ryan Gustus in 2012 and Dr. Jill Leichty Roth in 2013.

While our practice is new to the area, our doctors are not!  Dr. Schamerloh moved to Roanoke in 2010 and has since become involved through the Chamber of Commerce and the Roanoke Farmer’s Market.  Dr. Roth and her husband, Dr. Zachary Roth also make their home in Roanoke, Dr. Zach’s boyhood home!  And Dr. Gustus, while living in Fort Wayne, has family ties to Roanoke and surrounding areas.  Together, we bring over 50 years of experience and expertise, providing a wide range of services to patients of all ages. 

Also open is Optik, our boutique eyewear establishment where our specially trained staff will help you find the perfect fit!   Specializing in hand-crafted and quality American, Japanese, German, Spanish, and Italian frames, and using only high quality lens materials, we have something for everyone. 

We enjoy the small town setting where we can create lasting relationships and contribute meaningfully to the community.  Because of this, and our multiple ties to the area, Roanoke is a natural fit!

Name: Eyes on 45th
Description:
Welcome to Eyeson45th Optometrists, your trusted eye care specialists. We are a dedicated team of experienced optometrists committed to providing exceptional vision care services to our community.

At Eyeson45th, we prioritize your eye health and offer a comprehensive range of services to meet all your vision needs. From routine eye exams and contact lens fittings to the diagnosis and management of eye conditions, our skilled professionals are here to ensure optimal eye health and clear vision for every patient.

With state-of-the-art technology and a patient-centered approach, we strive to deliver personalized care tailored to your unique needs. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff will guide you through every step of your eye care journey, ensuring your comfort and satisfaction.

We believe in the power of education and take the time to educate our patients about their eye health and the importance of preventative measures. Our goal is to empower you with the knowledge and tools to make informed decisions about your vision care.

At Eyeson45th, we also offer a wide selection of high-quality eyewear, including stylish frames and the latest lens technologies. Our opticians will assist you in finding the perfect eyewear that suits your style, comfort, and visual requirements.

Join us in prioritizing your eye health and experiencing exceptional eye care. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest advancements in optometry, eye health tips, and community events. Let's work together to preserve and enhance your vision.

Visit our website or contact us to schedule your next eye exam and discover the Eyeson45th difference.

Name: Sophie Optical
Description:
Sophie Optical is a Dallas-based eyewear company committed to bringing luxury-quality frames to everyone. Named after our founder’s daughter, Sophie, we believe that everyone deserves to experience the same craftsmanship, materials, and design found in top designer brands—without the inflated price tags.

Our collections are carefully designed and manufactured with premium materials, ensuring exceptional comfort, durability, and style. At Sophie Optical, we’re redefining what it means to shop for eyewear: luxury frames for real life, made accessible for all.

Name: Optik Schmeck
Description: Optik Schmeck ist ein seit über 100 Jahren bestehendes Familienunternehmen in der Aachener Innenstadt.

Name: Henry Miller Opticians
Description: Henry Miller was a Bohemian optician who immigrated to America around 1900. When he first arrived, he worked for Miss Martha Dora Polen, Optometrist and Optician, located at 1629 Madison Avenue. Over time, Martha and Henry became more than business partners and they married. In 1909, they opened Henry Miller Opticians, located close to Lenox Hill Hospital. In 1976, Ralph Gerchberg, O.D., Phd., purchased Henry Miller Opticians. He kept the name because everyone in the neighborhood knew the business. Henry Miller Opticians moved to its present location - 972 Lexington Avenue in 2005, where Kirk Gerchberg is the current, proud owner. Visit Henry Miller Opticians, where you are more than a customer, you are a guest!

Name: BLUESAFE 24
Description: Unlike other blue light glasses that don't block enough blue light to effectively protect circadian health, or that block more than is needed, interfering with vision and everyday use, our patented 𝘉𝘓𝘜𝘌𝘚𝘈𝘍𝘌 24 lenses are designed to deliver exactly the right amount of blue light blocking, protecting circadian health while preserving brightness and functional color vision. CircadianEye LLC, creators of 𝘉𝘓𝘜𝘌𝘚𝘈𝘍𝘌 24, was founded in 2021 in partnership with CIRCADIAN to develop and market patented blue light lens technologies, drawing on research from Harvard Medical School, University of Toronto, and the CIRCADIAN Light Research Center. Our leadership team combines deep expertise in consumer eyewear, lens design, medicine, and optimizing human performance in 24/7 mission critical organizations.
